tEn: ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge
tZh: ImageNet大规模视觉识别挑战赛
sEn: The ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge is a benchmark for object category classification and detection, driving advances in computer vision.
sZh: ImageNet大规模视觉识别挑战赛是物体分类与检测的基准，推动了计算机视觉的进步。
absEn: The ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge is a benchmark in object category classification and detection on hundreds of object categories and millions of images. The challenge has been run annually from 2010 to present, attracting participation from more than fifty institutions. This paper describes the creation of this benchmark dataset and the advances in object recognition that have been possible as a result. We discuss the challenges of collecting large-scale ground truth annotation, highlight key breakthroughs in categorical object recognition, provide a detailed analysis of the current state of the field of large-scale image classification and object detection, and compare the state-of-the-art computer vision accuracy with human accuracy. We conclude with lessons learned in the five years of the challenge, and propose future directions and improvements.
absZh: ImageNet大规模视觉识别挑战赛是一个针对数百个物体类别和数百万张图像的物体分类与检测基准。该挑战赛自2010年起每年举办，吸引了超过五十家机构参与。本文描述了该基准数据集的创建过程以及由此带来的物体识别进展。我们讨论了收集大规模真实标注的挑战，强调了分类物体识别的关键突破，详细分析了大规模图像分类和物体检测领域的现状，并将最先进的计算机视觉精度与人类精度进行了比较。最后，我们总结了挑战赛五年来的经验教训，并提出了未来的方向和改进措施。

contrib.en: Introduced the ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge (ILSVRC), a benchmark for object classification and detection with 1000 categories and millions of images.
contrib.zh: 提出了ImageNet大规模视觉识别挑战赛（ILSVRC），这是一个包含1000个类别和数百万张图像的物体分类与检测基准。

contrib.en: Developed scalable crowdsourcing methods for large-scale image annotation, achieving 99.7% precision.
contrib.zh: 开发了可扩展的众包方法用于大规模图像标注，达到了99.7%的精确率。

contrib.en: Demonstrated that deep convolutional neural networks (e.g., AlexNet) significantly outperform traditional methods, marking a turning point in object recognition.
contrib.zh: 证明了深度卷积神经网络（如AlexNet）显著优于传统方法，标志着物体识别的转折点。

contrib.en: Provided a detailed analysis of algorithmic progress over five years, comparing state-of-the-art computer vision accuracy with human accuracy.
contrib.zh: 提供了五年间算法进展的详细分析，将最先进的计算机视觉准确率与人类准确率进行了比较。

contrib.en: Established evaluation metrics for large-scale classification, localization, and detection, including top-5 error and average precision.
contrib.zh: 建立了大规模分类、定位和检测的评估指标，包括top-5错误率和平均精确率。

contrib.en: Released a publicly available dataset and competition framework that became the standard benchmark for object recognition research.
contrib.zh: 发布了公开可用的数据集和竞赛框架，成为物体识别研究的标准基准。

limits.en: Dataset annotation only labels one object category per image for classification, causing ambiguity when multiple objects are present.
limits.zh: 数据集标注仅对每张图像标记一个物体类别用于分类，当存在多个物体时会产生歧义。

limits.en: Evaluation metrics for localization may be inaccurate for images with clustered objects, requiring manual removal of 3.5% of images.
limits.zh: 定位评估指标对于包含聚集物体的图像可能不准确，需要手动移除3.5%的图像。

limits.en: Small object instances pose challenges for localization evaluation; threshold adjustment is needed for objects under 25x25 pixels.
limits.zh: 小物体实例对定位评估构成挑战；需要对小于25x25像素的物体调整阈值。

limits.en: The dataset's 1000 categories are limited to ImageNet synsets and may not cover all real-world object types.
limits.zh: 数据集的1000个类别仅限于ImageNet同义词集，可能无法覆盖所有真实世界的物体类型。

limits.en: Crowdsourcing annotation quality relies on worker consensus, which may vary across different object categories.
limits.zh: 众包标注质量依赖于工人共识，不同物体类别之间可能存在差异。

items.en: The ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge is a benchmark in object category classification and detection on hundreds of object categories and millions of images. The challenge has been run annually from 2010 to present, attracting participation from more than fifty institutions.
items.zh: ImageNet大规模视觉识别挑战赛是一个在数百个物体类别和数百万张图像上进行物体类别分类和检测的基准测试。该挑战赛自2010年起每年举办，吸引了来自五十多个机构的参与。

items.en: This paper describes the creation of this benchmark dataset and the advances in object recognition that have been possible as a result. We discuss the challenges of collecting large-scale ground truth annotation, highlight key breakthroughs in categorical object recognition, provide a detailed analysis of the current state of the field of large-scale image classification and object detection, and compare the state-of-the-art computer vision accuracy with human accuracy. We conclude with lessons learned in the five years of the challenge, and propose future directions and improvements.
items.zh: 本文描述了该基准数据集的创建过程以及由此带来的物体识别方面的进展。我们讨论了收集大规模真实标注的挑战，强调了类别物体识别的关键突破，提供了大规模图像分类和物体检测领域现状的详细分析，并将最先进的计算机视觉准确性与人类准确性进行了比较。最后，我们总结了挑战赛五年来的经验教训，并提出了未来的方向和改进措施。

items.en: The ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge (ILSVRC) has been running annually for five years (since 2010) and has become the standard benchmark for large-scale object recognition.111In this paper, we will be using the term object recognition broadly to encompass both image classification (a task requiring an algorithm to determine what object classes are present in the image) as well as object detection (a task requiring an algorithm to localize all objects present in the image). ILSVRC follows in the footsteps of the PASCAL VOC challenge (Everingham et al.,, 2012), established in 2005, which set the precedent for standardized evaluation of recognition algorithms in the form of yearly competitions. As in PASCAL VOC, ILSVRC consists of two components: (1) a publically available dataset, and (2) an annual competition and corresponding workshop. The dataset allows for the development and comparison of categorical object recognition algorithms, and the competition and workshop provide a way to track the progress and discuss the lessons learned from the most successful and innovative entries each year.
items.zh: ImageNet大规模视觉识别挑战赛（ILSVRC）已连续举办五年（自2010年起），并已成为大规模物体识别的标准基准。¹¹¹本文中，我们将广义地使用“物体识别”一词，涵盖图像分类（要求算法确定图像中存在哪些物体类别的任务）以及物体检测（要求算法定位图像中所有物体的任务）。ILSVRC沿袭了PASCAL VOC挑战赛（Everingham等人，2012）的传统，该挑战赛始于2005年，以年度竞赛的形式为识别算法的标准化评估开创了先例。与PASCAL VOC一样，ILSVRC包含两个组成部分：（1）公开可用的数据集，以及（2）年度竞赛及相应的研讨会。数据集支持分类物体识别算法的开发和比较，而竞赛和研讨会则提供了一种追踪进展并讨论每年最成功和创新性参赛作品经验教训的方式。

items.en: The publically released dataset contains a set of manually annotated training images. A set of test images is also released, with the manual annotations withheld.222 In 2010, the test annotations were later released publicly; since then the test annotation have been kept hidden. Participants train their algorithms using the training images and then automatically annotate the test images. These predicted annotations are submitted to the evaluation server. Results of the evaluation are revealed at the end of the competition period and authors are invited to share insights at the workshop held at the International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) or European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) in alternate years.
items.zh: 公开发布的数据集包含一组人工标注的训练图像。同时发布一组测试图像，但人工标注被隐藏。²²² 2010年，测试标注后来被公开；此后测试标注一直保密。参赛者使用训练图像训练算法，然后自动标注测试图像。这些预测标注提交到评估服务器。评估结果在竞赛期结束时公布，作者受邀在隔年交替举行的国际计算机视觉大会（ICCV）或欧洲计算机视觉大会（ECCV）的研讨会上分享见解。

items.en: ILSVRC annotations fall into one of two categories: (1) image-level annotation of a binary label for the presence or absence of an object class in the image, e.g., “there are cars in this image” but “there are no tigers,” and (2) object-level annotation of a tight bounding box and class label around an object instance in the image, e.g., “there is a screwdriver centered at position (20,25) with width of 50 pixels and height of 30 pixels”.
items.zh: ILSVRC的标注分为两类：（1）图像级标注，即图像中是否存在某物体类别的二元标签，例如“图像中有汽车”但“没有老虎”；（2）物体级标注，即图像中物体实例的紧密边界框和类别标签，例如“在位置(20,25)处有一个螺丝刀，宽度50像素，高度30像素”。

items.en: In creating the dataset, several challenges had to be addressed. Scaling up from 19,737 images in PASCAL VOC 2010 to 1,461,406 in ILSVRC 2010 and from 20 object classes to 1000 object classes brings with it several challenges. It is no longer feasible for a small group of annotators to annotate the data as is done for other datasets (Fei-Fei et al.,, 2004; Criminisi,, 2004; Everingham et al.,, 2012; Xiao et al.,, 2010). Instead we turn to designing novel crowdsourcing approaches for collecting large-scale annotations (Su et al.,, 2012; Deng et al.,, 2009, 2014).
items.zh: 在创建数据集时，需要应对若干挑战。从PASCAL VOC 2010的19,737张图像扩展到ILSVRC 2010的1,461,406张图像，以及从20个物体类别扩展到1000个物体类别，带来了若干挑战。像其他数据集那样由一小群标注员进行标注已不再可行（Fei-Fei等人，2004；Criminisi，2004；Everingham等人，2012；Xiao等人，2010）。相反，我们转向设计新颖的众包方法来收集大规模标注（Su等人，2012；Deng等人，2009，2014）。

items.en: Some of the 1000 object classes may not be as easy to annotate as the 20 categories of PASCAL VOC: e.g., bananas which appear in bunches may not be as easy to delineate as the basic-level categories of aeroplanes or cars. Having more than a million images makes it infeasible to annotate the locations of all objects (much less with object segmentations, human body parts, and other detailed annotations that subsets of PASCAL VOC contain). New evaluation criteria have to be defined to take into account the facts that obtaining perfect manual annotations in this setting may be infeasible.
items.zh: 1000个物体类别中的某些类别可能不如PASCAL VOC的20个类别那样容易标注：例如，成串出现的香蕉可能不如飞机或汽车等基本级别类别那样容易描绘。拥有超过一百万张图像使得标注所有物体的位置变得不可行（更不用说像PASCAL VOC子集包含的物体分割、人体部位和其他详细标注了）。必须定义新的评估标准，以考虑到在此设置中获得完美人工标注可能不可行的事实。

items.en: Once the challenge dataset was collected, its scale allowed for unprecedented opportunities both in evaluation of object recognition algorithms and in developing new techniques. Novel algorithmic innovations emerge with the availability of large-scale training data. The broad spectrum of object categories motivated the need for algorithms that are even able to distinguish classes which are visually very similar. We highlight the most successful of these algorithms in this paper, and compare their performance with human-level accuracy.
items.zh: 一旦收集到挑战数据集，其规模为物体识别算法的评估和新技术的开发提供了前所未有的机会。大规模训练数据的可用性催生了新颖的算法创新。广泛的物体类别类别促使算法需要能够区分视觉上非常相似的类别。本文重点介绍其中最成功的算法，并将其性能与人类水平精度进行比较。

items.en: Finally, the large variety of object classes in ILSVRC allows us to perform an analysis of statistical properties of objects and their impact on recognition algorithms. This type of analysis allows for a deeper understanding of object recognition, and for designing the next generation of general object recognition algorithms.
items.zh: 最后，ILSVRC中大量多样的物体类别使我们能够分析物体的统计特性及其对识别算法的影响。这种分析有助于更深入地理解物体识别，并为设计下一代通用物体识别算法奠定基础。

items.en: To discuss the challenges of creating this large-scale object recognition benchmark dataset,
items.zh: 讨论创建这一大规模物体识别基准数据集所面临的挑战，

items.en: To highlight the developments in object classification and detection that have resulted from this effort, and
items.zh: 突出展示由此产生的物体分类和检测方面的发展，以及

items.en: To take a closer look at the current state of the field of categorical object recognition.
items.zh: 更深入地审视分类物体识别领域的当前状态。

items.en: The paper may be of interest to researchers working on creating large-scale datasets, as well as to anybody interested in better understanding the history and the current state of large-scale object recognition.
items.zh: 本文可能对从事大规模数据集创建的研究人员，以及对更好理解大规模物体识别的历史和现状感兴趣的任何人有所裨益。

items.en: We briefly discuss some prior work in constructing benchmark image datasets.
items.zh: 我们简要讨论一些构建基准图像数据集的前期工作。

items.en: Caltech 101 (Fei-Fei et al.,, 2004) was among the first standardized datasets for multi-category image classification, with 101 object classes and commonly 15-30 training images per class. Caltech 256 (Griffin et al.,, 2007) increased the number of object classes to 256 and added images with greater scale and background variability. The TinyImages dataset (Torralba et al.,, 2008) contains 80 million 32x32 low resolution images collected from the internet using synsets in WordNet (Miller,, 1995) as queries. However, since this data has not been manually verified, there are many errors, making it less suitable for algorithm evaluation. Datasets such as 15 Scenes (Oliva and Torralba,, 2001; Fei-Fei and Perona,, 2005; Lazebnik et al.,, 2006) or recent Places (Zhou et al.,, 2014) provide a single scene category label (as opposed to an object category).
items.zh: Caltech 101（Fei-Fei 等，2004）是最早用于多类别图像分类的标准化数据集之一，包含 101 个物体类别，每类通常有 15-30 张训练图像。Caltech 256（Griffin 等，2007）将物体类别数增加到 256，并增加了尺度和背景变异性更大的图像。TinyImages 数据集（Torralba 等，2008）包含 8000 万张 32x32 的低分辨率图像，这些图像使用 WordNet（Miller，1995）中的同义词集作为查询从互联网收集而来。然而，由于这些数据未经人工验证，存在许多错误，因此不太适合用于算法评估。诸如 15 Scenes（Oliva 和 Torralba，2001；Fei-Fei 和 Perona，2005；Lazebnik 等，2006）或最近的 Places（Zhou 等，2014）等数据集提供单个场景类别标签（而非物体类别）。

items.en: The ImageNet dataset (Deng et al.,, 2009) is the backbone of ILSVRC. ImageNet is an image dataset organized according to the WordNet hierarchy (Miller,, 1995). Each concept in WordNet, possibly described by multiple words or word phrases, is called a “synonym set” or “synset”. ImageNet populates 21,841 synsets of WordNet with an average of 650 manually verified and full resolution images. As a result, ImageNet contains 14,197,122 annotated images organized by the semantic hierarchy of WordNet (as of August 2014). ImageNet is larger in scale and diversity than the other image classification datasets. ILSVRC uses a subset of ImageNet images for training the algorithms and some of ImageNet’s image collection protocols for annotating additional images for testing the algorithms.
items.zh: ImageNet 数据集（Deng 等，2009）是 ILSVRC 的支柱。ImageNet 是一个根据 WordNet 层次结构（Miller，1995）组织的图像数据集。WordNet 中的每个概念（可能由多个单词或短语描述）称为一个“同义词集”或“synset”。ImageNet 为 WordNet 的 21,841 个同义词集填充了平均 650 张经过人工验证的全分辨率图像。因此，截至 2014 年 8 月，ImageNet 包含 14,197,122 张按 WordNet 语义层次结构组织的标注图像。ImageNet 在规模和多样性上均大于其他图像分类数据集。ILSVRC 使用 ImageNet 图像的一个子集来训练算法，并使用 ImageNet 的部分图像收集协议来标注额外的图像以测试算法。

items.en: Many datasets aim to provide richer image annotations beyond image-category labels. LabelMe (Russell et al.,, 2007) contains general photographs with multiple objects per image. It has bounding polygon annotations around objects, but the object names are not standardized: annotators are free to choose which objects to label and what to name each object. The SUN2012 (Xiao et al.,, 2010) dataset contains 16,873 manually cleaned up and fully annotated images more suitable for standard object detection training and evaluation. SIFT Flow (Liu et al.,, 2011) contains 2,688 images labeled using the LabelMe system. The LotusHill dataset (Yao et al.,, 2007) contains very detailed annotations of objects in 636,748 images and video frames, but it is not available for free. Several datasets provide pixel-level segmentations: for example, MSRC dataset (Criminisi,, 2004) with 591 images and 23 object classes, Stanford Background Dataset (Gould et al.,, 2009) with 715 images and 8 classes, and the Berkeley Segmentation dataset (Arbelaez et al.,, 2011) with 500 images annotated with object boundaries. OpenSurfaces segments surfaces from consumer photographs and annotates them with surface properties, including material, texture, and contextual information (Bell et al.,, 2013) .
items.zh: 许多数据集旨在提供比图像类别标签更丰富的图像标注。LabelMe（Russell 等，2007）包含每张图像中有多个物体的普通照片。它包含物体周围的边界多边形标注，但物体名称未标准化：标注者可以自由选择标注哪些物体以及如何命名每个物体。SUN2012（Xiao 等，2010）数据集包含 16,873 张经过人工清理和完全标注的图像，更适合用于标准物体检测训练和评估。SIFT Flow（Liu 等，2011）包含 2,688 张使用 LabelMe 系统标注的图像。LotusHill 数据集（Yao 等，2007）包含 636,748 张图像和视频帧中物体的非常详细的标注，但并非免费提供。几个数据集提供像素级分割：例如，MSRC 数据集（Criminisi，2004）包含 591 张图像和 23 个物体类别，Stanford Background 数据集（Gould 等，2009）包含 715 张图像和 8 个类别，以及 Berkeley Segmentation 数据集（Arbelaez 等，2011）包含 500 张带有物体边界标注的图像。OpenSurfaces 从消费者照片中分割表面，并用表面属性（包括材质、纹理和上下文信息）进行标注（Bell 等，2013）。

items.en: The closest to ILSVRC is the PASCAL VOC dataset (Everingham et al.,, 2010, 2014), which provides a standardized test bed for object detection, image classification, object segmentation, person layout, and action classification. Much of the design choices in ILSVRC have been inspired by PASCAL VOC and the similarities and differences between the datasets are discussed at length throughout the paper. ILSVRC scales up PASCAL VOC’s goal of standardized training and evaluation of recognition algorithms by more than an order of magnitude in number of object classes and images: PASCAL VOC 2012 has 20 object classes and 21,738 images compared to ILSVRC2012 with 1000 object classes and 1,431,167 annotated images.
items.zh: 与 ILSVRC 最接近的是 PASCAL VOC 数据集（Everingham 等，2010，2014），它为物体检测、图像分类、物体分割、人物布局和动作分类提供了标准化测试平台。ILSVRC 的许多设计选择都受到 PASCAL VOC 的启发，本文详细讨论了这两个数据集之间的异同。ILSVRC 将 PASCAL VOC 的识别算法标准化训练和评估目标扩展了一个数量级以上，体现在物体类别数和图像数上：PASCAL VOC 2012 有 20 个物体类别和 21,738 张图像，而 ILSVRC2012 有 1000 个物体类别和 1,431,167 张标注图像。

items.en: The recently released COCO dataset (Lin et al., 2014b, ) contains more than 328,000 images with 2.5 million object instances manually segmented. It has fewer object categories than ILSVRC (91 in COCO versus 200 in ILSVRC object detection) but more instances per category (27K on average compared to about 1K in ILSVRC object detection). Further, it contains object segmentation annotations which are not currently available in ILSVRC. COCO is likely to become another important large-scale benchmark.
items.zh: 最近发布的 COCO 数据集（Lin 等，2014b）包含超过 328,000 张图像，其中有 250 万个物体实例经过人工分割。它的物体类别数少于 ILSVRC（COCO 有 91 类，而 ILSVRC 物体检测有 200 类），但每类实例数更多（平均 27K，而 ILSVRC 物体检测约为 1K）。此外，它包含 ILSVRC 目前没有的物体分割标注。COCO 很可能成为另一个重要的大规模基准。

items.en: ILSVRC makes extensive use of Amazon Mechanical Turk to obtain accurate annotations (Sorokin and Forsyth,, 2008). Works such as (Welinder et al.,, 2010; Sheng et al.,, 2008; Vittayakorn and Hays,, 2011) describe quality control mechanisms for this marketplace. (Vondrick et al.,, 2012) provides a detailed overview of crowdsourcing video annotation. A related line of work is to obtain annotations through well-designed games, e.g. (von Ahn and Dabbish,, 2005). Our novel approaches to crowdsourcing accurate image annotations are in Sections 3.1.3, 3.2.1 and 3.3.3.
items.zh: ILSVRC 广泛使用 Amazon Mechanical Turk 来获取准确的标注（Sorokin 和 Forsyth，2008）。诸如（Welinder 等，2010；Sheng 等，2008；Vittayakorn 和 Hays，2011）等工作描述了该市场的质量控制机制。（Vondrick 等，2012）提供了众包视频标注的详细概述。相关工作是通过精心设计的游戏获取标注，例如（von Ahn 和 Dabbish，2005）。我们在第 3.1.3、3.2.1 和 3.3.3 节中介绍了众包准确图像标注的新方法。

items.en: There are several datasets with standardized online evaluation similar to ILSVRC: the aforementioned PASCAL VOC (Everingham et al.,, 2012), Labeled Faces in the Wild (Huang et al.,, 2007) for unconstrained face recognition, Reconstruction meets Recognition (Urtasun et al.,, 2014) for 3D reconstruction and KITTI (Geiger et al.,, 2013) for computer vision in autonomous driving. These datasets along with ILSVRC help benchmark progress in different areas of computer vision. Works such as (Torralba and Efros,, 2011) emphasize the importance of examining the bias inherent in any standardized dataset.
items.zh: 有几个数据集提供与 ILSVRC 类似的标准化在线评估：前述的 PASCAL VOC（Everingham 等，2012）、用于无约束人脸识别的 Labeled Faces in the Wild（Huang 等，2007）、用于 3D 重建的 Reconstruction meets Recognition（Urtasun 等，2014）以及用于自动驾驶计算机视觉的 KITTI（Geiger 等，2013）。这些数据集与 ILSVRC 一起帮助衡量计算机视觉不同领域的进展。诸如（Torralba 和 Efros，2011）等工作强调了检查任何标准化数据集中固有偏差的重要性。

items.en: We begin with a brief overview of ILSVRC challenge tasks in Section 2. Dataset collection and annotation are described at length in Section 3. Section 4 discusses the evaluation criteria of algorithms in the large-scale recognition setting. Section 5 provides an overview of the methods developed by ILSVRC participants.
items.zh: 我们首先在第2节简要概述ILSVRC挑战任务。第3节详细描述了数据集的收集和标注。第4节讨论了大尺度识别设置中算法的评估标准。第5节概述了ILSVRC参与者开发的方法。

items.en: Section 6 contains an in-depth analysis of ILSVRC results: Section 6.1 documents the progress of large-scale recognition over the years, Section 6.2 concludes that ILSVRC results are statistically significant, Section 6.3 thoroughly analyzes the current state of the field of object recognition, and Section 6.4 compares state-of-the-art computer vision accuracy with human accuracy. We conclude and discuss lessons learned from ILSVRC in Section 7.
items.zh: 第6节包含对ILSVRC结果的深入分析：第6.1节记录了大尺度识别多年来的进展，第6.2节得出结论认为ILSVRC结果具有统计显著性，第6.3节深入分析了目标识别领域的当前状态，第6.4节将最先进的计算机视觉准确性与人类准确性进行了比较。我们在第7节总结并讨论了从ILSVRC中获得的经验教训。

items.en: The goal of ILSVRC is to estimate the content of photographs for the purpose of retrieval and automatic annotation. Test images are presented with no initial annotation, and algorithms have to produce labelings specifying what objects are present in the images. New test images are collected and labeled especially for this competition and are not part of the previously published ImageNet dataset (Deng et al.,, 2009).
items.zh: ILSVRC 的目标是估计照片的内容，以便进行检索和自动标注。测试图像在提交时没有初始标注，算法必须生成标签，指明图像中存在哪些物体。新的测试图像是专门为本次比赛收集和标注的，不属于先前发布的 ImageNet 数据集（Deng 等人，2009）。

items.en: ILSVRC over the years has consisted of one or more of the following tasks (years in parentheses):333In addition, ILSVRC in 2012 also included a taster fine-grained classification task, where algorithms would classify dog photographs into one of 120 dog breeds (Khosla et al.,, 2011). Fine-grained classification has evolved into its own Fine-Grained classification challenge in 2013 (Berg et al.,, 2013), which is outside the scope of this paper.
items.zh: 多年来，ILSVRC 包含以下一个或多个任务（括号内为年份）：333此外，2012 年的 ILSVRC 还包括一个尝试性的细粒度分类任务，算法需将狗的照片分类为 120 个犬种之一（Khosla 等人，2011）。细粒度分类在 2013 年发展成了独立的细粒度分类挑战赛（Berg 等人，2013），这不在本文的讨论范围内。

items.en: Image classification (2010-2014): Algorithms produce a list of object categories present in the image.
items.zh: 图像分类（2010-2014）：算法生成图像中存在的物体类别列表。

items.en: Single-object localization (2011-2014): Algorithms produce a list of object categories present in the image, along with an axis-aligned bounding box indicating the position and scale of one instance of each object category.
items.zh: 单物体定位（2011-2014）：算法生成图像中存在的物体类别列表，并给出每个物体类别的一个实例的轴对齐边界框，指示其位置和尺度。

items.en: Object detection (2013-2014): Algorithms produce a list of object categories present in the image along with an axis-aligned bounding box indicating the position and scale of every instance of each object category.
items.zh: 物体检测（2013-2014）：算法生成图像中存在的物体类别列表，并给出每个物体类别的每个实例的轴对齐边界框，指示其位置和尺度。

items.en: This section provides an overview and history of each of the three tasks. Table 1 shows summary statistics.
items.zh: 本节概述了这三个任务的历史。表 1 显示了汇总统计信息。

items.en: Data for the image classification task consists of photographs collected from Flickr444www.flickr.com and other search engines, manually labeled with the presence of one of 1000 object categories. Each image contains one ground truth label.
items.zh: 图像分类任务的数据包括从Flickr444www.flickr.com和其他搜索引擎收集的照片，这些照片经过人工标注，标记了1000个物体类别中每个类别是否存在。每张图像包含一个真实标签。

items.en: For each image, algorithms produce a list of object categories present in the image. The quality of a labeling is evaluated based on the label that best matches the ground truth label for the image (see Section 4.1).
items.zh: 对于每张图像，算法会生成图像中存在的物体类别列表。标签质量根据与图像真实标签最匹配的标签进行评估（见第4.1节）。

items.en: Constructing ImageNet was an effort to scale up an image classification dataset to cover most nouns in English using tens of millions of manually verified photographs (Deng et al.,, 2009). The image classification task of ILSVRC came as a direct extension of this effort. A subset of categories and images was chosen and fixed to provide a standardized benchmark while the rest of ImageNet continued to grow.
items.zh: 构建ImageNet是一项努力，旨在通过使用数千万张经过人工验证的照片，将图像分类数据集扩展到覆盖英语中的大多数名词（Deng等人，2009）。ILSVRC的图像分类任务正是这一努力的直接延伸。选择并固定了一部分类别和图像，以提供标准化的基准，而ImageNet的其余部分则继续增长。

items.en: The single-object localization task, introduced in 2011, built off of the image classification task to evaluate the ability of algorithms to learn the appearance of the target object itself rather than its image context.
items.zh: 单目标定位任务于2011年提出，它建立在图像分类任务的基础上，旨在评估算法学习目标对象本身外观而非其图像上下文的能力。

items.en: Data for the single-object localization task consists of the same photographs collected for the image classification task, hand labeled with the presence of one of 1000 object categories. Each image contains one ground truth label. Additionally, every instance of this category is annotated with an axis-aligned bounding box.
items.zh: 单目标定位任务的数据由图像分类任务收集的相同照片组成，并手工标注了1000个对象类别中某一类别的存在。每张图像包含一个真实标签。此外，该类别的每个实例都用轴对齐的边界框进行了标注。

items.en: For each image, algorithms produce a list of object categories present in the image, along with a bounding box indicating the position and scale of one instance of each object category. The quality of a labeling is evaluated based on the object category label that best matches the ground truth label, with the additional requirement that the location of the predicted instance is also accurate (see Section 4.2).
items.zh: 对于每张图像，算法会生成图像中存在的对象类别列表，以及每个对象类别一个实例的位置和尺度的边界框。标注质量根据与真实标签最佳匹配的对象类别标签进行评估，同时要求预测实例的位置也准确（见第4.2节）。

items.en: The object detection task went a step beyond single-object localization and tackled the problem of localizing multiple object categories in the image. This task has been a part of the PASCAL VOC for many years on the scale of 20 object categories and tens of thousands of images, but scaling it up by an order of magnitude in object categories and in images proved to be very challenging from a dataset collection and annotation point of view (see Section 3.3).
items.zh: 目标检测任务超越了单目标定位，解决了在图像中定位多个目标类别的问题。该任务多年来一直是 PASCAL VOC 的一部分，涉及 20 个目标类别和数万张图像，但从数据集收集和标注的角度来看，将目标类别和图像数量扩大一个数量级被证明极具挑战性（见第 3.3 节）。

items.en: Data for the detection tasks consists of new photographs collected from Flickr using scene-level queries. The images are annotated with axis-aligned bounding boxes indicating the position and scale of every instance of each target object category. The training set is additionally supplemented with (a) data from the single-object localization task, which contains annotations for all instances of just one object category, and (b) negative images known not to contain any instance of some object categories.
items.zh: 检测任务的数据由使用场景级查询从 Flickr 收集的新照片组成。图像用轴对齐的边界框进行标注，指示每个目标类别每个实例的位置和尺度。训练集还补充了 (a) 来自单目标定位任务的数据，其中包含仅一个目标类别的所有实例的标注，以及 (b) 已知不包含某些目标类别任何实例的负样本图像。

items.en: For each image, algorithms produce bounding boxes indicating the position and scale of all instances of all target object categories. The quality of labeling is evaluated by recall, or number of target object instances detected, and precision, or the number of spurious detections produced by the algorithm (see Section 4.3).
items.zh: 对于每张图像，算法生成边界框，指示所有目标类别所有实例的位置和尺度。标注质量通过召回率（即检测到的目标实例数量）和精确率（即算法产生的虚假检测数量）来评估（见第 4.3 节）。

items.en: Our process of constructing large-scale object recognition image datasets consists of three key steps.
items.zh: 我们构建大规模目标识别图像数据集的过程包含三个关键步骤。

items.en: The first step is defining the set of target object categories. To do this, we select from among the existing ImageNet (Deng et al.,, 2009) categories. By using WordNet as a backbone (Miller,, 1995), ImageNet already takes care of disambiguating word meanings and of combining together synonyms into the same object category. Since the selection of object categories needs to be done only once per challenge task, we use a combination of automatic heuristics and manual post-processing to create the list of target categories appropriate for each task. For example, for image classification we may include broader scene categories such as a type of beach, but for single-object localization and object detection we want to focus only on object categories which can be unambiguously localized in images (Sections 3.1.1 and 3.3.1).
items.zh: 第一步是定义目标对象类别集合。为此，我们从现有的 ImageNet (Deng et al., 2009) 类别中进行选择。通过使用 WordNet 作为骨干 (Miller, 1995)，ImageNet 已经处理了词义消歧以及将同义词合并到同一对象类别的问题。由于每个挑战任务只需选择一次对象类别，我们结合自动启发式方法和手动后处理来创建适合每个任务的目标类别列表。例如，对于图像分类，我们可能包含更广泛的场景类别，如某种海滩；但对于单目标定位和目标检测，我们只关注能够在图像中明确定位的对象类别（第 3.1.1 节和第 3.3.1 节）。

items.en: The second step is collecting a diverse set of candidate images to represent the selected categories. We use both automatic and manual strategies on multiple search engines to do the image collection. The process is modified for the different ILSVRC tasks. For example, for object detection we focus our efforts on collecting scene-like images using generic queries such as “African safari” to find pictures likely to contain multiple animals in one scene (Section 3.3.2).
items.zh: 第二步是收集多样化的候选图像以代表所选类别。我们使用多个搜索引擎上的自动和手动策略进行图像收集。该过程针对不同的 ILSVRC 任务进行了修改。例如，对于目标检测，我们专注于使用通用查询（如“非洲野生动物园”）收集场景类图像，以找到可能包含多个动物在同一场景中的图片（第 3.3.2 节）。

items.en: The third (and most challenging) step is annotating the millions of collected images to obtain a clean dataset. We carefully design crowdsourcing strategies targeted to each individual ILSVRC task. For example, the bounding box annotation system used for localization and detection tasks consists of three distinct parts in order to include automatic crowdsourced quality control (Section 3.2.1). Annotating images fully with all target object categories (on a reasonable budget) for object detection requires an additional hierarchical image labeling system (Section 3.3.3).
items.zh: 第三步（也是最具有挑战性的一步）是对收集到的数百万张图像进行标注，以获得干净的数据集。我们精心设计了针对每个 ILSVRC 任务的众包策略。例如，用于定位和检测任务的边界框标注系统由三个不同的部分组成，以便包含自动众包质量控制（第 3.2.1 节）。在合理的预算内，为目标检测任务完全标注所有目标对象类别需要额外的层次化图像标注系统（第 3.3.3 节）。

items.en: We describe the data collection and annotation procedure for each of the ILSVRC tasks in order: image classification (Section 3.1), single-object localization (Section 3.2), and object detection (Section 3.3), focusing on the three key steps for each dataset.
items.zh: 我们按顺序描述每个 ILSVRC 任务的数据收集和标注过程：图像分类（第 3.1 节）、单目标定位（第 3.2 节）和目标检测（第 3.3 节），重点介绍每个数据集的三个关键步骤。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The diversity of data in the ILSVRC image classification and single-object localization tasks. For each of the eight dimensions, we show example object categories along the range of that property. Object scale, number of instances and image clutter for each object category are computed using the metrics defined in Section 3.2.2 and in Appendix B. The other properties were computed by asking human subjects to annotate each of the 1000 object categories (Russakovsky et al.,, 2013).
items.capZh: 图1：ILSVRC图像分类和单目标定位任务中数据的多样性。对于八个维度中的每一个，我们展示了沿该属性范围的示例对象类别。每个对象类别的物体尺度、实例数量和图像杂乱度使用第3.2.2节和附录B中定义的指标计算。其他属性通过要求人类标注者对1000个对象类别中的每一个进行标注来计算（Russakovsky等，2013）。

items.en: The image classification task tests the ability of an algorithm to name the objects present in the image, without necessarily localizing them.
items.zh: 图像分类任务测试算法对图像中存在的物体进行命名的能力，而不必定位它们。

items.en: We describe the choices we made in constructing the ILSVRC image classification dataset: selecting the target object categories from ImageNet (Section 3.1.1), collecting a diverse set of candidate images by using multiple search engines and an expanded set of queries in multiple languages (Section 3.1.2), and finally filtering the millions of collected images using the carefully designed crowdsourcing strategy of ImageNet (Deng et al.,, 2009) (Section 3.1.3).
items.zh: 我们描述了在构建 ILSVRC 图像分类数据集时所做的选择：从 ImageNet 中选择目标物体类别（第 3.1.1 节），通过使用多个搜索引擎和多种语言的扩展查询来收集多样化的候选图像集（第 3.1.2 节），最后使用 ImageNet（Deng 等人，2009）精心设计的众包策略过滤收集到的数百万张图像（第 3.1.3 节）。

items.en: The 1000 categories used for the image classification task were selected from the ImageNet (Deng et al.,, 2009) categories. The 1000 synsets are selected such that there is no overlap between synsets: for any synsets i𝑖i and j𝑗j, i𝑖i is not an ancestor of j𝑗j in the ImageNet hierarchy. These synsets are part of the larger hierarchy and may have children in ImageNet; however, for ILSVRC we do not consider their child subcategories. The synset hierarchy of ILSVRC can be thought of as a “trimmed” version of the complete ImageNet hierarchy. Figure 1 visualizes the diversity of the ILSVRC2012 object categories.
items.zh: 用于图像分类任务的 1000 个类别选自 ImageNet（Deng 等人，2009）的类别。选择这 1000 个同义词集时，确保同义词集之间没有重叠：对于任何同义词集 i 和 j，i 不是 j 在 ImageNet 层次结构中的祖先。这些同义词集是更大层次结构的一部分，可能在 ImageNet 中有子节点；然而，对于 ILSVRC，我们不考虑它们的子类别。ILSVRC 的同义词集层次结构可以看作是完整 ImageNet 层次结构的“修剪”版本。图 1 可视化了 ILSVRC2012 物体类别的多样性。

items.en: The exact 1000 synsets used for the image classification and single-object localization tasks have changed over the years. There are 639 synsets which have been used in all five ILSVRC challenges so far. In the first year of the challenge synsets were selected randomly from the available ImageNet synsets at the time, followed by manual filtering to make sure the object categories were not too obscure. With the introduction of the object localization challenge in 2011 there were 321 synsets that changed: categories such as “New Zealand beach” which were inherently difficult to localize were removed, and some new categories from ImageNet containing object localization annotations were added. In ILSVRC2012, 90 synsets were replaced with categories corresponding to dog breeds to allow for evaluation of more fine-grained object classification, as shown in Figure 2. The synsets have remained consistent since year 2012. Appendix A provides the complete list of object categories used in ILSVRC2012-2014.
items.zh: 用于图像分类和单物体定位任务的确切 1000 个同义词集多年来有所变化。到目前为止，在所有五届 ILSVRC 挑战赛中，有 639 个同义词集被使用。在挑战赛的第一年，同义词集是从当时可用的 ImageNet 同义词集中随机选择的，然后进行手动过滤，以确保物体类别不会过于晦涩。随着 2011 年物体定位挑战赛的引入，有 321 个同义词集发生了变化：诸如“新西兰海滩”等本质上难以定位的类别被移除，并添加了来自 ImageNet 的一些包含物体定位标注的新类别。在 ILSVRC2012 中，90 个同义词集被替换为与犬种相对应的类别，以便评估更细粒度的物体分类，如图 2 所示。自 2012 年以来，同义词集保持一致。附录 A 提供了 ILSVRC2012-2014 中使用的物体类别的完整列表。

items.capEn: Figure 2: The ILSVRC dataset contains many more fine-grained classes compared to the standard PASCAL VOC benchmark; for example, instead of the PASCAL “dog” category there are 120 different breeds of dogs in ILSVRC2012-2014 classification and single-object localization tasks.
items.capZh: 图2：与标准PASCAL VOC基准相比，ILSVRC数据集包含更多细粒度类别；例如，在ILSVRC2012-2014分类和单目标定位任务中，不是PASCAL的“狗”类别，而是有120种不同的狗品种。

items.en: Image collection for ILSVRC classification task is the same as the strategy employed for constructing ImageNet (Deng et al.,, 2009). Training images are taken directly from ImageNet. Additional images are collected for the ILSVRC using this strategy and randomly partitioned into the validation and test sets.
items.zh: ILSVRC 分类任务的图像收集与构建 ImageNet（Deng 等人，2009）所采用的策略相同。训练图像直接来自 ImageNet。使用此策略为 ILSVRC 收集额外的图像，并随机划分为验证集和测试集。

items.en: We briefly summarize the process; (Deng et al.,, 2009) contains further details. Candidate images are collected from the Internet by querying several image search engines. For each synset, the queries are the set of WordNet synonyms. Search engines typically limit the number of retrievable images (on the order of a few hundred to a thousand). To obtain as many images as possible, we expand the query set by appending the queries with the word from parent synsets, if the same word appears in the glossary of the target synset. For example, when querying “whippet”, according to WordNet’s glossary a “small slender dog of greyhound type developed in England”, we also use “whippet dog” and “whippet greyhound.” To further enlarge and diversify the candidate pool, we translate the queries into other languages, including Chinese, Spanish, Dutch and Italian. We obtain accurate translations using WordNets in those languages.
items.zh: 我们简要总结该过程；（Deng 等人，2009）包含更多细节。通过查询多个图像搜索引擎，从互联网收集候选图像。对于每个同义词集，查询是 WordNet 同义词的集合。搜索引擎通常限制可检索的图像数量（大约几百到一千）。为了获得尽可能多的图像，我们通过将查询附加来自父同义词集的词来扩展查询集，如果该词出现在目标同义词集的词汇表中。例如，当查询“whippet”时，根据 WordNet 的词汇表，它是一种“英国灵缇型的小型瘦狗”，我们也使用“whippet dog”和“whippet greyhound”。为了进一步扩大和多样化候选池，我们将查询翻译成其他语言，包括中文、西班牙语、荷兰语和意大利语。我们使用这些语言的 WordNet 获得准确的翻译。

items.en: Annotating images with corresponding object classes follows the strategy employed by ImageNet (Deng et al.,, 2009). We summarize it briefly here.
items.zh: 用相应的物体类别标注图像遵循 ImageNet（Deng 等人，2009）采用的策略。我们在此简要总结。

items.en: To collect a highly accurate dataset, we rely on humans to verify each candidate image collected in the previous step for a given synset. This is achieved by using Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT), an online platform on which one can put up tasks for users for a monetary reward. With a global user base, AMT is particularly suitable for large scale labeling. In each of our labeling tasks, we present the users with a set of candidate images and the definition of the target synset (including a link to Wikipedia). We then ask the users to verify whether each image contains objects of the synset. We encourage users to select images regardless of occlusions, number of objects and clutter in the scene to ensure diversity.
items.zh: 为了收集高度准确的数据集，我们依靠人类来验证上一步为给定同义词集收集的每张候选图像。这是通过使用 Amazon Mechanical Turk（AMT）实现的，这是一个在线平台，人们可以在上面发布任务给用户以获取金钱奖励。凭借全球用户群，AMT 特别适合大规模标注。在每个标注任务中，我们向用户展示一组候选图像和目标同义词集的定义（包括指向 Wikipedia 的链接）。然后，我们要求用户验证每张图像是否包含该同义词集的物体。我们鼓励用户选择图像，无论场景中的遮挡、物体数量和杂乱程度如何，以确保多样性。

items.en: While users are instructed to make accurate judgment, we need to set up a quality control system to ensure this accuracy. There are two issues to consider. First, human users make mistakes and not all users follow the instructions. Second, users do not always agree with each other, especially for more subtle or confusing synsets, typically at the deeper levels of the tree. The solution to these issues is to have multiple users independently label the same image. An image is considered positive only if it gets a convincing majority of the votes. We observe, however, that different categories require different levels of consensus among users. For example, while five users might be necessary for obtaining a good consensus on “Burmese cat” images, a much smaller number is needed for “cat” images. We develop a simple algorithm to dynamically determine the number of agreements needed for different categories of images. For each synset, we first randomly sample an initial subset of images. At least 10 users are asked to vote on each of these images. We then obtain a confidence score table, indicating the probability of an image being a good image given the consensus among user votes. For each of the remaining candidate images in this synset, we proceed with the AMT user labeling until a pre-determined confidence score threshold is reached.
items.zh: 虽然指示用户做出准确判断，但我们需要建立质量控制体系来确保这种准确性。有两个问题需要考虑。首先，人类用户会犯错，并非所有用户都遵循指示。其次，用户之间并不总是一致，尤其是对于更微妙或令人困惑的同义词集，通常位于树的更深层。这些问题的解决方案是让多个用户独立标注同一张图像。只有当图像获得令人信服的多数票时，才被认为是正样本。然而，我们观察到，不同类别需要不同水平的用户共识。例如，虽然可能需要五个用户才能对“缅甸猫”图像获得良好的共识，但对于“猫”图像则需要少得多的用户。我们开发了一种简单的算法来动态确定不同类别图像所需的同意数量。对于每个同义词集，我们首先随机抽样一个初始图像子集。至少要求 10 个用户对每张图像进行投票。然后，我们获得一个置信度得分表，指示在用户投票共识下图像是好图像的概率。对于该同义词集中剩余的每张候选图像，我们继续进行 AMT 用户标注，直到达到预定的置信度得分阈值。

items.en: Evaluation of the accuracy of the large-scale crowdsourced image annotation system was done on the entire ImageNet (Deng et al.,, 2009). A total of 80 synsets were randomly sampled at every tree depth of the mammal and vehicle subtrees. An independent group of subjects verified the correctness of each of the images. An average of 99.7%percent99.799.7\% precision is achieved across the synsets. We expect similar accuracy on ILSVRC image classification dataset since the image annotation pipeline has remained the same. To verify, we manually checked 1500 ILSVRC2012-2014 image classification test set images (the test set has remained unchanged in these three years). We found 5 annotation errors, corresponding as expected to 99.7%percent99.799.7\% precision.
items.zh: 大规模众包图像标注系统的准确性评估是在整个 ImageNet（Deng 等人，2009）上进行的。在哺乳动物和车辆子树的每个树深度随机抽样了总共 80 个同义词集。一组独立的受试者验证了每张图像的正确性。所有同义词集的平均精度达到 99.7%。由于图像标注流程保持不变，我们预计 ILSVRC 图像分类数据集具有类似的准确性。为了验证，我们手动检查了 1500 张 ILSVRC2012-2014 图像分类测试集图像（测试集在这三年中保持不变）。我们发现了 5 个标注错误，对应 99.7% 的精度，符合预期。

items.en: Using the image collection and annotation procedure described in previous sections, we collected a large-scale dataset used for ILSVRC classification task. There are 1000 object classes and approximately 1.2 million training images, 50 thousand validation images and 100 thousand test images. Table 2 (top) documents the size of the dataset over the years of the challenge.
items.zh: 使用前面章节描述的图像收集和标注流程，我们收集了一个用于 ILSVRC 分类任务的大规模数据集。共有 1000 个物体类别，大约 120 万张训练图像、5 万张验证图像和 10 万张测试图像。表 2（顶部）记录了挑战赛多年来数据集的大小。

full.secZh: 3.2 单目标定位数据集构建

items.en: The single-object localization task evaluates the ability of an algorithm to localize one instance of an object category. It was introduced as a taster task in ILSVRC 2011, and became an official part of ILSVRC in 2012.
items.zh: 单目标定位任务评估算法定位一个目标类别实例的能力。该任务在 ILSVRC 2011 中作为尝鲜任务引入，并于 2012 年成为 ILSVRC 的正式组成部分。

items.en: The key challenge was developing a scalable crowdsourcing method for object bounding box annotation. Our three-step self-verifying pipeline is described in Section 3.2.1. Having the dataset collected, we perform detailed analysis in Section 3.2.2 to ensure that the dataset is sufficiently varied to be suitable for evaluation of object localization algorithms.
items.zh: 关键挑战在于开发一种可扩展的众包方法用于目标边界框标注。我们的三步自验证流程在第 3.2.1 节中描述。数据集收集完成后，我们在第 3.2.2 节中进行详细分析，以确保数据集具有足够的多样性，适合评估目标定位算法。

items.en: The object classes for single-object localization task are the same as the object classes for image classification task described above in Section 3.1. The training images for localization task are a subset of the training images used for image classification task, and the validation and test images are the same between both tasks.
items.zh: 单目标定位任务的目标类别与第 3.1 节中描述的图像分类任务的目标类别相同。定位任务的训练图像是图像分类任务所用训练图像的一个子集，而验证集和测试集在两个任务中相同。

items.en: Recall that for the image classification task every image was annotated with one object class label, corresponding to one object that is present in an image. For the single-object localization task, every validation and test image and a subset of the training images are annotated with axis-aligned bounding boxes around every instance of this object.
items.zh: 回顾一下，对于图像分类任务，每张图像都标注了一个目标类别标签，对应图像中存在的一个目标。对于单目标定位任务，每张验证和测试图像以及部分训练图像都标注了该目标每个实例的轴对齐边界框。

items.en: Every bounding box is required to be as small as possible while including all visible parts of the object instance. An alternate annotation procedure could be to annotate the full (estimated) extent of the object: e.g., if a person’s legs are occluded and only the torso is visible, the bounding box could be drawn to include the likely location of the legs. However, this alternative procedure is inherently ambiguous and ill-defined, leading to disagreement among annotators and among researchers (what is the true “most likely” extent of this object?). We follow the standard protocol of only annotating visible object parts (Russell et al.,, 2007; Everingham et al.,, 2010).555Some datasets such as PASCAL VOC (Everingham et al.,, 2010) and LabelMe (Russell et al.,, 2007) are able to provide more detailed annotations: for example, marking individual object instances as being truncated. We chose not to provide this level of detail in favor of annotating more images and more object instances.
items.zh: 每个边界框必须尽可能小，同时包含目标实例的所有可见部分。另一种标注程序可能是标注目标的完整（估计）范围：例如，如果一个人的腿被遮挡，只有躯干可见，边界框可以画成包含腿的可能位置。然而，这种替代程序本质上是模糊且定义不清的，会导致标注者之间以及研究人员之间的分歧（这个目标的真正“最可能”范围是什么？）。我们遵循标准协议，仅标注可见的目标部分（Russell 等，2007；Everingham 等，2010）。555一些数据集如 PASCAL VOC（Everingham 等，2010）和 LabelMe（Russell 等，2007）能够提供更详细的标注：例如，标记单个目标实例为截断。我们选择不提供这种详细程度，而是标注更多图像和更多目标实例。

items.en: We summarize the crowdsourced bounding box annotation system described in detail in (Su et al.,, 2012). The goal is to build a system that is fully automated, highly accurate, and cost-effective. Given a collection of images where the object of interest has been verified to exist, for each image the system collects a tight bounding box for every instance of the object.
items.zh: 我们总结了（Su 等，2012）中详细描述的众包边界框标注系统。目标是构建一个完全自动化、高精度且成本效益高的系统。给定一组已验证目标存在的图像，系统为每张图像中该目标的每个实例收集一个紧密边界框。

items.en: Quality Each bounding box needs to be tight, i.e. the smallest among all bounding boxes that contains all visible parts of the object. This facilitates the object detection learning algorithms by providing the precise location of each object instance;
items.zh: 质量：每个边界框需要是紧密的，即包含目标所有可见部分的所有边界框中最小的一个。这有助于目标检测学习算法，提供每个目标实例的精确位置；

items.en: Coverage Every object instance needs to have a bounding box. This is important for training localization algorithms because it tells the learning algorithms with certainty what is not the object.
items.zh: 覆盖：每个目标实例都需要有一个边界框。这对于训练定位算法很重要，因为它明确告诉学习算法什么不是目标。

items.en: The core challenge of building such a system is effectively controlling the data quality with minimal cost. Our key observation is that drawing a bounding box is significantly more difficult and time consuming than giving answers to multiple choice questions. Thus quality control through additional verification tasks is more cost-effective than consensus-based algorithms. This leads to the following workflow with simple basic subtasks:
items.zh: 构建这样一个系统的核心挑战是以最低成本有效控制数据质量。我们的关键观察是，绘制边界框比回答多项选择题要困难和耗时得多。因此，通过额外验证任务进行质量控制比基于共识的算法更具成本效益。这导致了以下包含简单基本子任务的工作流程：

items.en: Drawing A worker draws one bounding box around one instance of an object on the given image.
items.zh: 绘制：一名工人在给定图像上围绕一个目标实例绘制一个边界框。

items.en: Quality verification A second worker checks if the bounding box is correctly drawn.
items.zh: 质量验证：第二名工人检查边界框是否绘制正确。

items.en: Coverage verification A third worker checks if all object instances have bounding boxes.
items.zh: 覆盖验证：第三名工人检查是否所有目标实例都有边界框。

items.en: The sub-tasks are designed following two principles. First, the tasks are made as simple as possible. For example, instead of asking the worker to draw all bounding boxes on the same image, we ask the worker to draw only one. This reduces the complexity of the task. Second, each task has a fixed and predictable amount of work. For example, assuming that the input images are clean (object presence is correctly verified) and the coverage verification tasks give correct results, the amount of work of the drawing task is always that of providing exactly one bounding box.
items.zh: 子任务的设计遵循两个原则。首先，任务尽可能简单。例如，我们不要求工人在同一张图像上绘制所有边界框，而是要求只绘制一个。这降低了任务的复杂性。其次，每个任务有固定且可预测的工作量。例如，假设输入图像是干净的（目标存在性已正确验证）且覆盖验证任务给出正确结果，那么绘制任务的工作量总是恰好提供一个边界框。

items.en: Quality control on Tasks 2 and 3 is implemented by embedding “gold standard” images where the correct answer is known. Worker training for each of these subtasks is described in detail in (Su et al.,, 2012).
items.zh: 任务 2 和 3 的质量控制通过嵌入已知正确答案的“黄金标准”图像来实现。这些子任务的工人培训在（Su 等，2012）中有详细描述。

items.en: The system is evaluated on 10 categories with ImageNet (Deng et al.,, 2009): balloon, bear, bed, bench, beach, bird, bookshelf, basketball hoop, bottle, and people. A subset of 200 images are randomly sampled from each category. On the image level, our evaluation shows that 97.9%percent97.997.9\% images are completely covered with bounding boxes. For the remaining 2.1%percent2.12.1\%, some bounding boxes are missing. However, these are all difficult cases: the size is too small, the boundary is blurry, or there is strong shadow.
items.zh: 该系统在 ImageNet（Deng 等，2009）的 10 个类别上进行了评估：气球、熊、床、长凳、海滩、鸟、书架、篮球框、瓶子和人。每个类别随机抽取 200 张图像子集。在图像层面，我们的评估显示 97.9% 的图像被边界框完全覆盖。对于剩余的 2.1%，缺少一些边界框。然而，这些都是困难情况：尺寸太小、边界模糊或存在强烈阴影。

items.en: On the bounding box level, 99.2%percent99.299.2\% of all bounding boxes are accurate (the bounding boxes are visibly tight). The remaining 0.8%percent0.80.8\% are somewhat off. No bounding boxes are found to have less than 50%percent5050\% intersection over union overlap with ground truth.
items.zh: 在边界框层面，99.2% 的边界框是准确的（边界框明显紧密）。剩余的 0.8% 有些偏差。没有发现边界框与真实标注的交并比低于 50%。

items.en: Additional evaluation of the overall cost and an analysis of quality control can be found in (Su et al.,, 2012).
items.zh: 关于总体成本和质量控制分析的额外评估可在（Su 等，2012）中找到。

items.en: Using the annotation procedure described above, we collect a large set of bounding box annotations for the ILSVRC single-object classification task. All 50 thousand images in the validation set and 100 thousand images in the test set are annotated with bounding boxes around all instances of the ground truth object class (one object class per image). In addition, in ILSVRC2011 25%percent2525\% of training images are annotated with bounding boxes the same way, yielding more than 310 thousand annotated images with more than 340 thousand annotated object instances. In ILSVRC2012 40%percent4040\% of training images are annotated, yielding more than 520 thousand annotated images with more than 590 thousand annotated object instances. Table 2 (bottom) documents the size of this dataset.
items.zh: 使用上述标注程序，我们为 ILSVRC 单目标分类任务收集了大量边界框标注。验证集中的所有 5 万张图像和测试集中的 10 万张图像都标注了真实目标类别所有实例的边界框（每张图像一个目标类别）。此外，在 ILSVRC2011 中，25% 的训练图像以相同方式标注了边界框，产生了超过 31 万张标注图像和超过 34 万个标注目标实例。在 ILSVRC2012 中，40% 的训练图像被标注，产生了超过 52 万张标注图像和超过 59 万个标注目标实例。表 2（底部）记录了该数据集的大小。

items.en: In addition to the size of the dataset, we also analyze the level of difficulty of object localization in these images compared to the PASCAL VOC benchmark. We compute statistics on the ILSVRC2012 single-object localization validation set images compared to PASCAL VOC 2012 validation images.
items.zh: 除了数据集大小，我们还分析了这些图像中目标定位的难度水平，并与 PASCAL VOC 基准进行了比较。我们计算了 ILSVRC2012 单目标定位验证集图像与 PASCAL VOC 2012 验证图像的统计数据。

items.en: Real-world scenes are likely to contain multiple instances of some objects, and nearby object instances are particularly difficult to delineate. The average object category in ILSVRC has 1.611.611.61 target object instances on average per positive image, with each instance having on average 0.470.470.47 neighbors (adjacent instances of the same object category). This is comparable to 1.691.691.69 instances per positive image and 0.520.520.52 neighbors per instance for an average object class in PASCAL.
items.zh: 真实场景可能包含多个目标实例，相邻目标实例尤其难以区分。ILSVRC 中平均目标类别每张正图像有 1.61 个目标实例，每个实例平均有 0.47 个邻居（同一目标类别的相邻实例）。这与 PASCAL 中平均每张正图像 1.69 个实例和每个实例 0.52 个邻居相当。

items.en: As described in (Hoiem et al.,, 2012), smaller objects tend to be significantly more difficult to localize. In the average object category in PASCAL the object occupies 24.1%percent24.124.1\% of the image area, and in ILSVRC 35.8%percent35.835.8\%. However, PASCAL has only 20 object categories while ILSVRC has 1000. The 537 object categories of ILSVRC with the smallest objects on average occupy the same fraction of the image as PASCAL objects: 24.1%percent24.124.1\%. Thus even though on average the object instances tend to be bigger in ILSVRC images, there are more than 25 times more object categories than in PASCAL VOC with the same average object scale.
items.zh: 如（Hoiem 等，2012）所述，较小的目标通常更难定位。在 PASCAL 的平均目标类别中，目标占据图像面积的 24.1%，而在 ILSVRC 中为 35.8%。然而，PASCAL 只有 20 个目标类别，而 ILSVRC 有 1000 个。ILSVRC 中平均目标最小的 537 个目标类别占据的图像面积比例与 PASCAL 目标相同：24.1%。因此，尽管 ILSVRC 图像中的目标实例平均更大，但具有相同平均目标尺度的目标类别数量是 PASCAL VOC 的 25 倍以上。

items.en: Appendix B and (Russakovsky et al.,, 2013) have additional comparisons.
items.zh: 附录 B 和（Russakovsky 等，2013）提供了更多比较。

items.en: The ILSVRC task of object detection evaluates the ability of an algorithm to name and localize all instances of all target objects present in an image. It is much more challenging than object localization because some object instances may be small/occluded/difficult to accurately localize, and the algorithm is expected to locate them all, not just the one it finds easiest.
items.zh: ILSVRC的目标检测任务评估算法对图像中所有目标实例进行命名和定位的能力。这比目标定位更具挑战性，因为某些目标实例可能很小、被遮挡或难以精确定位，并且算法需要定位所有实例，而不仅仅是它认为最容易的那个。

items.en: There are three key challenges in collecting the object detection dataset. The first challenge is selecting the set of common objects which tend to appear in cluttered photographs and are well-suited for benchmarking object detection performance. Our approach relies on statistics of the object localization dataset and the tradition of the PASCAL VOC challenge (Section 3.3.1).
items.zh: 收集目标检测数据集面临三个关键挑战。第一个挑战是选择一组常见物体，这些物体往往出现在杂乱的图像中，并且适合用于基准测试目标检测性能。我们的方法依赖于目标定位数据集的统计数据和PASCAL VOC挑战的传统（第3.3.1节）。

items.en: The second challenge is obtaining a much more varied set of scene images than those used for the image classification and single-object localization datasets. Section 3.3.2 describes the procedure for utilizing as much data from the single-object localization dataset as possible and supplementing it with Flickr images queried using hundreds of manually designed high-level queries.
items.zh: 第二个挑战是获取比图像分类和单目标定位数据集所使用的场景图像更加多样化的图像集。第3.3.2节描述了如何尽可能多地利用单目标定位数据集中的数据，并补充使用通过数百个手动设计的高级查询从Flickr获取的图像。

items.en: The third, and biggest, challenge is completely annotating this dataset with all the objects. This is done in two parts. Section 3.3.3 describes the first part: our hierarchical strategy for obtaining the list of all target objects which occur within every image. This is necessary since annotating in a straight-forward way by creating a task for every (image, object class) pair is no longer feasible at this scale. Appendix E describes the second part: annotating the bounding boxes around these objects, using the single-object localization bounding box annotation pipeline of Section 3.2.1 along with extra verification to ensure that every instance of the object is annotated with exactly one bounding box.
items.zh: 第三个也是最大的挑战是完整地标注该数据集中的所有物体。这分为两部分。第3.3.3节描述了第一部分：我们用于获取每张图像中所有目标物体列表的分层策略。这是必要的，因为通过为每对（图像，物体类别）创建任务来直接标注在这种规模下已不可行。附录E描述了第二部分：使用第3.2.1节的单目标定位边界框标注流程以及额外的验证，确保每个物体实例恰好被一个边界框标注，来标注这些物体周围的边界框。

items.en: There are 200 object classes hand-selected for the detection task, eacg corresponding to a synset within ImageNet. These were chosen to be mostly basic-level object categories that would be easy for people to identify and label. The rationale is that the object detection system developed for this task can later be combined with a fine-grained classification model to further classify the objects if a finer subdivision is desired.666Some of the training objects are actually annotated with more detailed classes: for example, one of the 200 object classes is the category “dog,” and some training instances are annotated with the specific dog breed. As with the 1000 classification classes, the synsets are selected such that there is no overlap: for any synsets i𝑖i and j𝑗j, i𝑖i is not an ancestor of j𝑗j in the ImageNet hierarchy.
items.zh: 检测任务手工选择了200个物体类别，每个类别对应ImageNet中的一个同义词集。这些类别主要是基本级别的物体类别，便于人们识别和标注。其理由是，为此任务开发的目标检测系统随后可以与细粒度分类模型结合，以便在需要更细划分时进一步对物体进行分类。666一些训练物体实际上标注了更详细的类别：例如，200个物体类别之一是“狗”类别，一些训练实例标注了具体的狗品种。与1000个分类类别一样，这些同义词集的选择确保没有重叠：对于任何同义词集i和j，i不是j在ImageNet层次结构中的祖先。

items.en: The selection of the 200 object detection classes in 2013 was guided by the ILSVRC 2012 classification and localization dataset. Starting with 1000 object classes and their bounding box annotations we first eliminated all object classes which tended to be too “big” in the image (on average the object area was greater than 50%percent5050\% of the image area). These were classes such as T-shirt, spiderweb, or manhole cover. We then manually eliminated all classes which we did not feel were well-suited for detection, such as hay, barbershop, or poncho. This left 494 object classes which were merged into basic-level categories: for example, different species of birds were merged into just the “bird” class. The classes remained the same in ILSVRC2014. Appendix D contains the complete list of object categories used in ILSVRC2013-2014 (in the context of the hierarchy described in Section 3.3.3).
items.zh: 2013年200个目标检测类别的选择受到ILSVRC 2012分类和定位数据集的指导。从1000个物体类别及其边界框标注开始，我们首先排除了所有在图像中倾向于“过大”的物体类别（平均物体面积大于图像面积的50%）。这些类别包括T恤、蜘蛛网或井盖等。然后我们手动排除了所有我们认为不适合检测的类别，例如干草、理发店或雨披。剩下494个物体类别被合并为基本级别类别：例如，不同种类的鸟被合并为“鸟”类别。这些类别在ILSVRC2014中保持不变。附录D包含了ILSVRC2013-2014中使用的物体类别完整列表（在第3.3.3节描述的层次结构背景下）。

items.en: Staying mindful of the tradition of the PASCAL VOC dataset we also tried to ensure that the set of 200 classes contains as many of the 20 PASCAL VOC classes as possible. Table 3 shows the correspondences. The changes that were done were to ensure more accurate and consistent crowdsourced annotations. The object class with the weakest correspondence is “potted plant” in PASCAL VOC, corresponding to “flower pot” in ILSVRC. “Potted plant” was one of the most challenging object classes to annotate consistently among the PASCAL VOC classes, and in order to obtain accurate annotations using crowdsourcing we had to restrict the definition to a more concrete object.
items.zh: 考虑到PASCAL VOC数据集的传统，我们还尽量确保200个类别中包含尽可能多的20个PASCAL VOC类别。表3显示了对应关系。所做的更改是为了确保更准确和一致的众包标注。对应关系最弱的物体类别是PASCAL VOC中的“盆栽植物”，对应ILSVRC中的“花盆”。在PASCAL VOC类别中，“盆栽植物”是最难一致标注的物体类别之一，为了通过众包获得准确标注，我们不得不将定义限制为更具体的物体。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Summary of images collected for the detection task. Images in green (bold) boxes have all instances of all 200 detection object classes fully annotated. Table 4 lists the complete statistics.
items.capZh: 图3：为检测任务收集的图像摘要。绿色（粗体）框中的图像具有所有200个检测对象类别的所有实例的完整标注。表4列出了完整的统计数据。

items.en: Many images for the detection task were collected differently than the images in ImageNet and the classification and single-object localization tasks. Figure 3 summarizes the types of images that were collected. Ideally all of these images would be scene images fully annotated with all target categories. However, given budget constraints our goal was to provide as much suitable detection data as possible, even if the images were drawn from a few different sources and distributions.
items.zh: 检测任务的许多图像收集方式与ImageNet以及分类和单目标定位任务不同。图3总结了收集的图像类型。理想情况下，所有这些图像都应该是场景图像，并完整标注所有目标类别。然而，由于预算限制，我们的目标是提供尽可能多的合适检测数据，即使这些图像来自几个不同的来源和分布。

items.en: The validation and test detection set images come from two sources (percent of images from each source in parentheses). The first source (77%)percent77(77\%) is images from ILSVRC2012 single-object localization validation and test sets corresponding to the 200 detection classes (or their children in the ImageNet hierarchy). Images where the target object occupied more than 50%percent5050\% of the image area were discarded, since they were unlikely to contain other objects of interest. The second source (23%)percent23(23\%) is images from Flickr collected specifically for detection task. We queried Flickr using a large set of manually defined queries, such as “kitchenette” or “Australian zoo” to retrieve images of scenes likely to contain several objects of interest. Appendix C contains the full list. We also added pairwise queries, or queries with two target object names such as “tiger lion,” which also often returned cluttered scenes.
items.zh: 验证集和测试集检测图像来自两个来源（括号内为每个来源的图像百分比）。第一个来源（77%）是来自ILSVRC2012单目标定位验证集和测试集中对应200个检测类别（或其ImageNet层次结构中的子节点）的图像。目标物体占据图像面积超过50%的图像被丢弃，因为它们不太可能包含其他感兴趣的物体。第二个来源（23%）是专门为检测任务从Flickr收集的图像。我们使用大量手动定义的查询（例如“小厨房”或“澳大利亚动物园”）查询Flickr，以检索可能包含多个感兴趣物体的场景图像。附录C包含完整列表。我们还添加了成对查询，即包含两个目标物体名称的查询，例如“老虎狮子”，这通常也会返回杂乱的场景。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Random selection of images in ILSVRC detection validation set. The images in the top 4 rows were taken from ILSVRC2012 single-object localization validation set, and the images in the bottom 4 rows were collected from Flickr using scene-level queries.
items.capZh: 图4：ILSVRC检测验证集中随机选择的图像。顶部4行的图像取自ILSVRC2012单目标定位验证集，底部4行的图像是使用场景级查询从Flickr收集的。

items.en: The training set for the detection task comes from three sources of images (percent of images from each source in parentheses). The first source (63%)percent63(63\%) is all training images from ILSVRC2012 single-object localization task corresponding to the 200 detection classes (or their children in the ImageNet hierarchy). We did not filter by object size, allowing teams to take advantage of all the positive examples available. The second source (24%)percent24(24\%) is negative images which were part of the original ImageNet collection process but voted as negative: for example, some of the images were collected from Flickr and search engines for the ImageNet synset “animals” but during the manual verification step did not collect enough votes to be considered as containing an “animal.” These images were manually re-verified for the detection task to ensure that they did not in fact contain the target objects. The third source (13%)percent13(13\%) is images collected from Flickr specifically for the detection task. These images were added for ILSVRC2014 following the same protocol as the second type of images in the validation and test set. This was done to bring the training and testing distributions closer together.
items.zh: 检测任务的训练集来自三个图像来源（括号内为每个来源的图像百分比）。第一个来源（63%）是来自ILSVRC2012单目标定位任务中对应200个检测类别（或其ImageNet层次结构中的子节点）的所有训练图像。我们没有按物体大小进行过滤，允许团队利用所有可用的正例。第二个来源（24%）是原始ImageNet收集过程中被标记为负例的图像：例如，一些图像是从Flickr和搜索引擎为ImageNet同义词集“动物”收集的，但在手动验证步骤中没有获得足够的投票以被认为包含“动物”。这些图像针对检测任务进行了手动重新验证，以确保它们确实不包含目标物体。第三个来源（13%）是专门为检测任务从Flickr收集的图像。这些图像是为ILSVRC2014添加的，遵循与验证集和测试集中第二种图像相同的协议。这样做是为了使训练和测试分布更接近。

items.en: The key challenge in annotating images for the object detection task is that all objects in all images need to be labeled. Suppose there are N inputs (images) which need to be annotated with the presence or absence of K labels (objects). A naïve approach would query humans for each combination of input and label, requiring N​K𝑁𝐾NK queries. However, N and K can be very large and the cost of this exhaustive approach quickly becomes prohibitive. For example, annotating 60,0006000060,000 validation and test images with the presence or absence of 200200200 object classes for the detection task naïvely would take 808080 times more effort than annotating 150,000150000150,000 validation and test images with 111 object each for the classification task – and this is not even counting the additional cost of collecting bounding box annotations around each object instance. This quickly becomes infeasible.
items.zh: 为目标检测任务标注图像的关键挑战在于需要标记所有图像中的所有物体。假设有N个输入（图像）需要标注K个标签（物体）的存在与否。一种朴素的方法是为每个输入和标签的组合查询人类，需要N*K次查询。然而，N和K可能非常大，这种穷举方法的成本很快就会变得过高。例如，为检测任务朴素地标注60,000张验证和测试图像中200个物体类别的存在与否，其工作量将是为150,000张验证和测试图像各标注1个物体的分类任务的80倍——这还不包括收集每个物体实例周围边界框标注的额外成本。这很快就变得不可行。

items.en: In (Deng et al.,, 2014) we study strategies for scalable multilabel annotation, or for efficiently acquiring multiple labels from humans for a collection of items. We exploit three key observations for labels in real world applications (illustrated in Figure LABEL:fig:chipull):
items.zh: 在(Deng et al., 2014)中，我们研究了可扩展多标签标注的策略，即如何高效地从人类那里获取一组物品的多个标签。我们利用了现实世界应用中标签的三个关键观察（如图LABEL:fig:chipull所示）：

items.en: Correlation. Subsets of labels are often highly correlated. Objects such as a computer keyboard, mouse and monitor frequently co-occur in images. Similarly, some labels tend to all be absent at the same time. For example, all objects that require electricity are usually absent in pictures taken outdoors. This suggests that we could potentially “fill in” the values of multiple labels by grouping them into only one query for humans. Instead of checking if dog, cat, rabbit etc. are present in the photo, we just check about the “animal” group If the answer is no, then this implies a no for all categories in the group.
items.zh: 相关性。标签子集通常高度相关。诸如计算机键盘、鼠标和显示器等物体经常在图像中同时出现。类似地，某些标签往往同时缺失。例如，所有需要电力的物体通常在户外照片中都不存在。这表明我们可以通过将多个标签分组为仅一次人类查询来“填充”多个标签的值。我们不需要检查图像中是否有狗、猫、兔子等，只需检查“动物”组。如果答案为否，则意味着该组中所有类别都为否。

items.en: Hierarchy. The above example of grouping dog, cat, rabbit etc. into animal has implicitly assumed that labels can be grouped together and humans can efficiently answer queries about the group as a whole. This brings up our second key observation: humans organize semantic concepts into hierarchies and are able to efficiently categorize at higher semantic levels (Thorpe et al.,, 1996), e.g. humans can determine the presence of an animal in an image as fast as every type of animal individually. This leads to substantial cost savings.
items.zh: 层次结构。上述将狗、猫、兔子等分组为动物的例子隐含地假设标签可以分组，并且人类可以有效地回答关于整个组的查询。这引出了我们的第二个关键观察：人类将语义概念组织成层次结构，并且能够有效地在更高语义层次进行分类(Thorpe et al., 1996)，例如，人类判断图像中是否存在动物的速度与判断每种动物类型一样快。这带来了显著的成本节约。

items.en: Sparsity. The values of labels for each image tend to be sparse, i.e. an image is unlikely to contain more than a dozen types of objects, a small fraction of the hundreds of object categories. This enables rapid elimination of many objects by quickly filling in no. With a high degree of sparsity, an efficient algorithm can have a cost which grows logarithmically with the number of objects instead of linearly.
items.zh: 稀疏性。每张图像的标签值往往是稀疏的，即一张图像不太可能包含超过十几种类型的物体，这仅是数百个物体类别中的一小部分。这使得通过快速填写“否”来迅速排除许多物体成为可能。在高度稀疏的情况下，高效算法的成本可以随物体数量对数增长，而不是线性增长。

items.en: We propose algorithmic strategies that exploit the above intuitions. The key is to select a sequence of queries for humans such that we achieve the same labeling results with only a fraction of the cost of the naïve approach. The main challenges include how to measure cost and utility of queries, how to construct good queries, and how to dynamically order them. A detailed description of the generic algorithm, along with theoretical analysis and empirical evaluation, is presented in (Deng et al.,, 2014).
items.zh: 我们提出了利用上述直觉的算法策略。关键在于选择一系列人类查询，使得我们能够以朴素方法成本的一小部分获得相同的标注结果。主要挑战包括如何衡量查询的成本和效用，如何构建好的查询，以及如何动态排序它们。通用算法的详细描述，以及理论分析和经验评估，见(Deng et al., 2014)。

items.en: The generic algorithm automatically selects the most informative queries to ask based on object label statistics learned from the training set. In our case of 200 object classes, since obtaining the training set was by itself challenging we chose to design the queries by hand. We created a hierarchy of queries of the type “is there a… in the image?” For example, one of the high-level questions was “is there an animal in the image?” We ask the crowd workers this question about every image we want to label. The children of the “animal” question would correspond to specific examples of animals: for example, “is there a mammal in the image?” or “is there an animal with no legs?” To annotate images efficiently, these questions are asked only on images determined to contain an animal. The 200 leaf node questions correspond to the 200 target objects, e.g., “is there a cat in the image?”. A few sample iterations of the algorithm are shown in Figure 6.
items.zh: 通用算法根据从训练集学习到的物体标签统计信息，自动选择信息量最大的查询。在我们的200个物体类别的情况下，由于获取训练集本身就很困难，我们选择手动设计查询。我们创建了一个查询层次结构，类型为“图像中是否有……？”。例如，一个高级问题是“图像中是否有动物？”。我们向众包工人询问关于每张要标注的图像的这个问题。“动物”问题的子问题对应具体的动物例子：例如，“图像中是否有哺乳动物？”或“图像中是否有无腿的动物？”。为了高效标注图像，这些问题仅针对被判定包含动物的图像提出。200个叶节点问题对应200个目标物体，例如，“图像中是否有猫？”。图6显示了该算法的几个示例迭代。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Our algorithm dynamically selects the next query to efficiently determine the presence or absence of every object in every image. Green denotes a positive annotation and red denotes a negative annotation. This toy example illustrates a sample progression of the algorithm for one label (cat) on a set of images.
items.capZh: 图6：我们的算法动态选择下一个查询，以高效确定每个图像中每个对象的存在与否。绿色表示正标注，红色表示负标注。这个玩具示例说明了算法在一组图像上对一个标签（猫）的样本进展。

items.en: Algorithm 1 is the formal algorithm for labeling an image with the presence or absence of each target object category. With this algorithm in mind, the hierarchy of questions was constructed following the principle that false positives only add extra cost whereas false negatives can significantly affect the quality of the labeling. Thus, it is always better to stick with more general but less ambiguous questions, such as “is there a mammal in the image?” as opposed to asking overly specific but potentially ambiguous questions, such as “is there an animal that can climb trees?” Constructing this hierarchy was a surprisingly time-consuming process, involving multiple iterations to ensure high accuracy of labeling and avoid question ambiguity. Appendix D shows the constructed hierarchy.
items.zh: 算法1是用每个目标物体类别的存在与否来标注图像的正式算法。考虑到这个算法，查询层次结构的构建遵循以下原则：假阳性只会增加额外成本，而假阴性会显著影响标注质量。因此，最好坚持使用更通用但歧义较少的问题，例如“图像中是否有哺乳动物？”，而不是提出过于具体但可能模糊的问题，例如“图像中是否有会爬树的动物？”。构建这个层次结构是一个相当耗时的过程，需要多次迭代以确保标注的高准确性并避免问题歧义。附录D显示了构建的层次结构。

items.en: Once all images are labeled with the presence or absence of all object categories we use the bounding box system described in Section 3.2.1 along with some additional modifications of Appendix E to annotate the location of every instance of every present object category.
items.zh: 一旦所有图像都标注了所有物体类别的存在与否，我们使用第3.2.1节描述的边界框系统以及附录E中的一些额外修改，来标注每个存在的物体类别的每个实例的位置。

items.en: Using the procedure described above, we collect a large-scale dataset for ILSVRC object detection task. There are 200 object classes and approximately 450K training images, 20K validation images and 40K test images. Table 4 documents the size of the dataset over the years of the challenge. The major change between ILSVRC2013 and ILSVRC2014 was the addition of 60,658 fully annotated training images.
items.zh: 使用上述过程，我们为ILSVRC目标检测任务收集了一个大规模数据集。共有200个物体类别，约45万张训练图像，2万张验证图像和4万张测试图像。表4记录了该数据集在挑战赛各年份的规模。ILSVRC2013和ILSVRC2014之间的主要变化是增加了60,658张完全标注的训练图像。

items.en: Prior to ILSVRC, the object detection benchmark was the PASCAL VOC challenge (Everingham et al.,, 2010). ILSVRC has 101010 times more object classes than PASCAL VOC (200 vs 20), 10.610.610.6 times more fully annotated training images (60,658 vs 5,717), 35.235.235.2 times more training objects (478,807 vs 13,609), 3.53.53.5 times more validation images (20,121 vs 5823) and 3.53.53.5 times more validation objects (55,501 vs 15,787). ILSVRC has 2.82.82.8 annotated objects per image on the validation set, compared to 2.72.72.7 in PASCAL VOC. The average object in ILSVRC takes up 17.0%percent17.017.0\% of the image area and in PASCAL VOC takes up 20.7%percent20.720.7\%; Table 3 contains per-class comparisons. Additionally, ILSVRC contains a wide variety of objects, including tiny objects such as sunglasses (1.3%percent1.31.3\% of image area on average), ping-pong balls (1.5%percent1.51.5\% of image area on average) and basketballs (2.0%percent2.02.0\% of image area on average).
items.zh: 在ILSVRC之前，目标检测基准是PASCAL VOC挑战(Everingham et al., 2010)。ILSVRC的物体类比PASCAL VOC多10倍（200对20），完全标注的训练图像多10.6倍（60,658对5,717），训练物体多35.2倍（478,807对13,609），验证图像多3.5倍（20,121对5,823），验证物体多3.5倍（55,501对15,787）。ILSVRC验证集上每张图像平均有2.8个标注物体，而PASCAL VOC为2.7个。ILSVRC中物体的平均面积占图像面积的17.0%，PASCAL VOC中为20.7%；表3包含逐类比较。此外，ILSVRC包含各种各样的物体，包括小物体如太阳镜（平均占图像面积的1.3%）、乒乓球（平均占图像面积的1.5%）和篮球（平均占图像面积的2.0%）。

items.en: Once the dataset has been collected, we need to define a standardized evaluation procedure for algorithms. Some measures have already been established by datasets such as the Caltech 101 (Fei-Fei et al.,, 2004) for image classification and PASCAL VOC (Everingham et al.,, 2012) for both image classification and object detection. To adapt these procedures to the large-scale setting we had to address three key challenges. First, for the image classification and single-object localization tasks only one object category could be labeled in each image due to the scale of the dataset. This created potential ambiguity during evaluation (addressed in Section 4.1). Second, evaluating localization of object instances is inherently difficult in some images which contain a cluster of objects (addressed in Section 4.2). Third, evaluating localization of object instances which occupy few pixels in the image is challenging (addressed in Section 4.3).
items.zh: 数据集收集完成后，我们需要为算法定义标准化的评估流程。一些数据集已经建立了评估指标，例如用于图像分类的 Caltech 101（Fei-Fei 等，2004）以及用于图像分类和物体检测的 PASCAL VOC（Everingham 等，2012）。为了将这些流程适应大规模场景，我们必须应对三个关键挑战。首先，对于图像分类和单物体定位任务，由于数据集规模庞大，每张图像只能标注一个物体类别。这在评估时造成了潜在的歧义（在第 4.1 节中讨论）。其次，在某些包含物体簇的图像中，评估物体实例的定位本身就很困难（在第 4.2 节中讨论）。第三，评估仅占据图像中少量像素的物体实例的定位具有挑战性（在第 4.3 节中讨论）。

items.en: In this section we describe the standardized evaluation criteria for each of the three ILSVRC tasks. We elaborate further on these and other more minor challenges with large-scale evaluation. Appendix F describes the submission protocol and other details of running the competition itself.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们描述了 ILSVRC 三项任务各自的标准化评估标准。我们进一步阐述了这些挑战以及大规模评估中的其他次要问题。附录 F 描述了提交协议以及运行比赛本身的其他细节。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Tasks in ILSVRC. The first column shows the ground truth labeling on an example image, and the next three show three sample outputs with the corresponding evaluation score.
items.capZh: 图7：ILSVRC中的任务。第一列显示示例图像上的真实标注，接下来的三列显示三个样本输出及相应的评估分数。

items.en: The scale of ILSVRC classification task (1000 categories and more than a million of images) makes it very expensive to label every instance of every object in every image. Therefore, on this dataset only one object category is labeled in each image. This creates ambiguity in evaluation. For example, an image might be labeled as a “strawberry” but contain both a strawberry and an apple. Then an algorithm would not know which one of the two objects to name. For the image classification task we allowed an algorithm to identify multiple (up to 5) objects in an image and not be penalized as long as one of the objects indeed corresponded to the ground truth label. Figure 7(top row) shows some examples.
items.zh: ILSVRC分类任务的规模（1000个类别和超过一百万张图像）使得对每张图像中每个物体的每个实例进行标注非常昂贵。因此，在该数据集上，每张图像只标注一个物体类别。这造成了评估中的歧义。例如，一张图像可能被标注为“草莓”，但其中同时包含草莓和苹果。那么算法将不知道应该命名这两个物体中的哪一个。对于图像分类任务，我们允许算法识别图像中的多个（最多5个）物体，并且只要其中一个物体确实与真实标签对应，就不会受到惩罚。图7（顶行）展示了一些示例。

items.en: Concretely, each image i𝑖i has a single class label Cisubscript𝐶𝑖C_{i}. An algorithm is allowed to return 5 labels ci​1,…​ci​5subscript𝑐𝑖1…subscript𝑐𝑖5c_{i1},\dots c_{i5}, and is considered correct if ci​j=Cisubscript𝑐𝑖𝑗subscript𝐶𝑖c_{ij}=C_{i} for some j𝑗j.
items.zh: 具体来说，每张图像 i 有一个单一类别标签 C_i。算法允许返回5个标签 c_{i1},...,c_{i5}，如果对于某个 j 有 c_{ij}=C_i，则认为正确。

items.en: Let the error of a prediction di​j=d​(ci​j,Ci)subscript𝑑𝑖𝑗𝑑subscript𝑐𝑖𝑗subscript𝐶𝑖d_{ij}=d(c_{ij},C_{i}) be 111 if ci​j≠Cisubscript𝑐𝑖𝑗subscript𝐶𝑖c_{ij}\neq C_{i} and 00 otherwise. The error of an algorithm is the fraction of test images on which the algorithm makes a mistake:
items.zh: 令预测 d_{ij}=d(c_{ij},C_i) 的错误为：如果 c_{ij}≠C_i 则为1，否则为0。算法的错误率是算法出错的测试图像所占的比例：

items.en: We used two additional measures of error. First, we evaluated top-1 error. In this case algorithms were penalized if their highest-confidence output label ci​1subscript𝑐𝑖1c_{i1} did not match ground truth class Cisubscript𝐶𝑖C_{i}. Second, we evaluated hierarchical error. The intuition is that confusing two nearby classes (such as two different breeds of dogs) is not as harmful as confusing a dog for a container ship. For the hierarchical criteria, the cost of one misclassification, d​(ci​j,Ci)𝑑subscript𝑐𝑖𝑗subscript𝐶𝑖d(c_{ij},C_{i}), is defined as the height of the lowest common ancestor of ci​jsubscript𝑐𝑖𝑗c_{ij} and Cisubscript𝐶𝑖C_{i} in the ImageNet hierarchy. The height of a node is the length of the longest path to a leaf node (leaf nodes have height zero).
items.zh: 我们使用了另外两种错误度量。首先，我们评估了top-1错误。在这种情况下，如果算法最高置信度的输出标签 c_{i1} 与真实类别 C_i 不匹配，则算法受到惩罚。其次，我们评估了层次化错误。直觉上，混淆两个相近的类别（例如两种不同品种的狗）不如将狗误认为集装箱船那么严重。对于层次化标准，一次错误分类的代价 d(c_{ij},C_i) 定义为在ImageNet层次结构中 c_{ij} 和 C_i 的最低共同祖先的高度。节点的高度是到叶节点的最长路径的长度（叶节点高度为零）。

items.en: However, in practice we found that all three measures of error (top-5, top-1, and hierarchical) produced the same ordering of results. Thus, since ILSVRC2012 we have been exclusively using the top-5 metric which is the simplest and most suitable to the dataset.
items.zh: 然而，在实践中我们发现所有三种错误度量（top-5、top-1和层次化）产生了相同的结果排序。因此，自ILSVRC2012以来，我们一直专门使用top-5度量，这是最简单且最适合该数据集的度量。

items.en: The evaluation for single-object localization is similar to object classification, again using a top-5 criteria to allow the algorithm to return unannotated object classes without penalty. However, now the algorithm is considered correct only if it both correctly identifies the target class Cisubscript𝐶𝑖C_{i} and accurately localizes one of its instances. Figure 7(middle row) shows some examples.
items.zh: 单目标定位的评估与目标分类类似，同样使用 top-5 标准，允许算法返回未标注的目标类别而不受惩罚。然而，现在算法只有在正确识别目标类别 C_i 并准确定位其一个实例时才被视为正确。图 7（中间行）展示了一些示例。

items.en: Concretely, an image is associated with object class Cisubscript𝐶𝑖C_{i}, with all instances of this object class annotated with bounding boxes Bi​ksubscript𝐵𝑖𝑘B_{ik}. An algorithm returns {(ci​j,bi​j)}j=15superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑐𝑖𝑗subscript𝑏𝑖𝑗𝑗15\{(c_{ij},b_{ij})\}_{j=1}^{5} of class labels ci​jsubscript𝑐𝑖𝑗c_{ij} and associated locations bi​jsubscript𝑏𝑖𝑗b_{ij}. The error of a prediction j𝑗j is:
items.zh: 具体来说，一张图像与目标类别 C_i 相关联，该目标类别的所有实例都用边界框 B_{ik} 标注。算法返回 {(c_{ij}, b_{ij})}_{j=1}^5，包含类别标签 c_{ij} 和关联位置 b_{ij}。预测 j 的误差为：

items.en: Here d​(bi​j,Bi​k)𝑑subscript𝑏𝑖𝑗subscript𝐵𝑖𝑘d(b_{ij},B_{ik}) is the error of localization, defined as 00 if the area of intersection of boxes bi​jsubscript𝑏𝑖𝑗b_{ij} and Bi​ksubscript𝐵𝑖𝑘B_{ik} divided by the areas of their union is greater than 0.50.50.5, and 111 otherwise. (Everingham et al.,, 2010) The error of an algorithm is computed as in Eq. 1.
items.zh: 其中 d(b_{ij}, B_{ik}) 是定位误差，定义为：如果框 b_{ij} 和 B_{ik} 的交集面积除以它们的并集面积大于 0.5，则为 0，否则为 1。(Everingham 等, 2010) 算法的误差按公式 1 计算。

items.en: Evaluating localization is inherently difficult in some images. Consider a picture of a bunch of bananas or a carton of apples. It is easy to classify these images as containing bananas or apples, and even possible to localize a few instances of each fruit. However, in order for evaluation to be accurate every instance of banana or apple needs to be annotated, and that may be impossible. To handle the images where localizing individual object instances is inherently ambiguous we manually discarded 3.5%percent3.53.5\% of images since ILSVRC2012. Some examples of discarded images are shown in Figure 8.
items.zh: 在某些图像中，评估定位本质上是困难的。考虑一串香蕉或一箱苹果的图片。将这些图像分类为包含香蕉或苹果很容易，甚至可能定位出每个水果的几个实例。然而，为了准确评估，需要标注每个香蕉或苹果的实例，这可能是不可能的。为了处理定位单个目标实例本身模糊的图像，我们从 ILSVRC2012 中手动丢弃了 3.5% 的图像。图 8 展示了一些被丢弃图像的示例。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Images marked as “difficult” in the ILSVRC2012 single-object localization validation set. Please refer to Section 4.2 for details.
items.capZh: 图8：在ILSVRC2012单目标定位验证集中标记为“困难”的图像。详情请参见第4.2节。

items.en: The criteria for object detection was adopted from PASCAL VOC (Everingham et al.,, 2010). It is designed to penalize the algorithm for missing object instances, for duplicate detections of one instance, and for false positive detections. Figure 7(bottom row) shows examples.
items.zh: 目标检测的评判标准源自 PASCAL VOC (Everingham et al., 2010)。该标准旨在惩罚算法遗漏目标实例、对同一实例重复检测以及误检的情况。图 7（底行）展示了示例。

items.en: For each object class and each image Iisubscript𝐼𝑖I_{i}, an algorithm returns predicted detections (bi​j,si​j)subscript𝑏𝑖𝑗subscript𝑠𝑖𝑗(b_{ij},s_{ij}) of predicted locations bi​jsubscript𝑏𝑖𝑗b_{ij} with confidence scores si​jsubscript𝑠𝑖𝑗s_{ij}. These detections are greedily matched to the ground truth boxes {Bi​k}subscript𝐵𝑖𝑘\{B_{ik}\} using Algorithm 2. For every detection j𝑗j on image i𝑖i the algorithm returns zi​j=1subscript𝑧𝑖𝑗1z_{ij}=1 if the detection is matched to a ground truth box according to the threshold criteria, and 00 otherwise. For a given object class, let N𝑁N be the total number of ground truth instances across all images. Given a threshold t𝑡t, define recall as the fraction of the N𝑁N objects detected by the algorithm, and precision as the fraction of correct detections out of the total detections returned by the algorithm. Concretely,
items.zh: 对于每个目标类别和每张图像 I_i，算法返回预测的检测结果 (b_ij, s_ij)，其中 b_ij 是预测位置，s_ij 是置信度分数。这些检测结果通过算法 2 与真实标注框 {B_ik} 进行贪心匹配。对于图像 i 上的每个检测 j，如果该检测根据阈值标准与某个真实标注框匹配，则算法返回 z_ij=1，否则返回 0。对于给定的目标类别，令 N 为所有图像中真实标注实例的总数。给定阈值 t，召回率定义为算法检测到的 N 个目标的比例，精确率定义为算法返回的所有检测结果中正确检测的比例。具体地，

items.en: The final metric for evaluating an algorithm on a given object class is average precision over the different levels of recall achieved by varying the threshold t𝑡t. The winner of each object class is then the team with the highest average precision, and then winner of the challenge is the team that wins on the most object classes.888In this paper we focus on the mean average precision across all categories as the measure of a team’s performance. This is done for simplicity and is justified since the ordering of teams by mean average precision was always the same as the ordering by object categories won.
items.zh: 评估算法在给定目标类别上表现的最终指标是，通过改变阈值 t 所达到的不同召回率水平上的平均精确率。每个目标类别的获胜者是平均精确率最高的团队，而挑战赛的获胜者是在最多目标类别上获胜的团队。8 在本文中，我们关注所有类别的平均精确率均值作为团队表现的衡量标准。这样做是为了简化，并且是合理的，因为按平均精确率均值排序的团队顺序与按获胜类别数排序的顺序总是一致的。
