full.sec: Appendix B Additional single-object localization dataset statistics
full.secZh: 附录B 单目标定位数据集补充统计

items.en: We consider two additional metrics of object localization difficulty: chance performance of localization and the level of clutter. We use these metrics to compare ILSVRC2012-2014 single-object localization dataset to the PASCAL VOC 2012 object detection benchmark. The measures of localization difficulty are computed on the validation set of both datasets. According to both of these measures of difficulty there is a subset of ILSVRC which is as challenging as PASCAL but more than an order of magnitude greater in size. Figure 16 shows the distributions of different properties (object scale, chance performance of localization and level of clutter) across the different classes in the two datasets.
items.zh: 我们考虑了两个额外的物体定位难度指标：定位的随机性能和杂乱程度。我们使用这些指标将ILSVRC2012-2014单目标定位数据集与PASCAL VOC 2012物体检测基准进行比较。定位难度的度量在两个数据集的验证集上计算。根据这两个难度度量，ILSVRC有一个子集与PASCAL一样具有挑战性，但规模大一个数量级以上。图16显示了两个数据集中不同类别之间不同属性（物体尺度、定位随机性能和杂乱程度）的分布。

items.en: Chance performance on a dataset is a common metric to consider. We define the CPL measure as the expected accuracy of a detector which first randomly samples an object instance of that class and then uses its bounding box directly as the proposed localization window on all other images (after rescaling the images to the same size). Concretely, let B1,B2,…,BNsubscript𝐵1subscript𝐵2…subscript𝐵𝑁B_{1},B_{2},\dots,B_{N} be all the bounding boxes of the object instances within a class, then
items.zh: 数据集上的随机性能是一个常见的度量。我们将CPL度量定义为检测器的期望准确率，该检测器首先随机采样该类的一个对象实例，然后直接将其边界框用作所有其他图像上的提议定位窗口（在将图像缩放到相同大小之后）。具体来说，设B1,B2,…,BN为类内所有对象实例的边界框，则

items.en: Some of the most difficult ILSVRC categories to localize according to this metric are basketball, swimming trunks, ping pong ball and rubber eraser, all with less than 0.2%percent0.20.2\% CPL. This measure correlates strongly (ρ=0.9𝜌0.9\rho=0.9) with the average scale of the object (fraction of image occupied by object). The average CPL across the 100010001000 ILSVRC categories is 20.8%percent20.820.8\%. The 20 PASCAL categories have an average CPL of 8.7%percent8.78.7\%, which is the same as the CPL of the 562562562 most difficult categories of ILSVRC.
items.zh: 根据这个度量，一些最难的ILSVRC定位类别是篮球、泳裤、乒乓球和橡皮擦，它们的CPL都低于0.2%。这个度量与物体的平均尺度（物体占据图像的比例）强相关（ρ=0.9）。ILSVRC的1000个类别的平均CPL为20.8%。PASCAL的20个类别的平均CPL为8.7%，这与ILSVRC中最难的562个类别的CPL相同。

items.en: Intuitively, even small objects are easy to localize on a plain background. To quantify clutter we employ the objectness measure of (Alexe et al.,, 2012), which is a class-generic object detector evaluating how likely a window in the image contains a coherent object (of any class) as opposed to background (sky, water, grass). For every image m𝑚m containing target object instances at positions B1m,B2m,…superscriptsubscript𝐵1𝑚superscriptsubscript𝐵2𝑚…B_{1}^{m},B_{2}^{m},\dots, we use the publicly available objectness software to sample 1000 windows W1m,W2m,…​W1000msuperscriptsubscript𝑊1𝑚superscriptsubscript𝑊2𝑚…superscriptsubscript𝑊1000𝑚W_{1}^{m},W_{2}^{m},\dots W_{1000}^{m}, in order of decreasing probability of the window containing any generic object. Let obj(m) be the number of generic object-looking windows sampled before localizing an instance of the target category, i.e., obj​(m)=min⁡{k:maxi⁡iou​(Wkm,Bim)≥0.5}obj𝑚:𝑘subscript𝑖iousuperscriptsubscript𝑊𝑘𝑚superscriptsubscript𝐵𝑖𝑚0.5\mbox{\sc obj}(m)=\min\{k:\max_{i}\mbox{\sc iou}(W_{k}^{m},B_{i}^{m})\geq 0.5\}. For a category containing M images, we compute the average number of such windows per image and define
items.zh: 直观上，即使是小物体在纯色背景上也容易定位。为了量化杂乱程度，我们采用了（Alexe等，2012）的objectness度量，这是一个类别通用的物体检测器，评估图像中的窗口包含一个连贯物体（任何类别）而不是背景（天空、水、草）的可能性。对于每个包含目标对象实例的图像m，其位置为B1m,B2m,…，我们使用公开可用的objectness软件按窗口包含任何通用物体的概率递减顺序采样1000个窗口W1m,W2m,…W1000m。设obj(m)为在定位到目标类别实例之前采样的通用物体外观窗口的数量，即obj(m)=min{k:max_i iou(W_k^m, B_i^m) ≥ 0.5}。对于一个包含M张图像的类别，我们计算每张图像此类窗口的平均数量，并定义

items.en: The higher the clutter of a category, the harder the objects are to localize according to generic cues. If an object can’t be localized with the first 1000 windows (as is the case for 1%percent11\% of images on average per category in ILSVRC and 5%percent55\% in PASCAL), we set obj(m)=1001𝑚1001(m)=1001. The fact that more than 95%percent9595\% of objects can be localized with these windows imply that the objectness cue is already quite strong, so objects that require many windows on average will be extremely difficult to detect: e.g., ping pong ball (clutter of 9.57, or 758 windows on average), basketball (clutter of 9.21), puck (clutter of 9.17) in ILSVRC. The most difficult object in PASCAL is bottle with clutter score of 8.478.478.47. On average, ILSVRC has clutter score of 3.593.593.59. The most difficult subset of ILSVRC with 250 object categories has an order of magnitude more categories and the same average amount of clutter (of 5.905.905.90) as the PASCAL dataset.
items.zh: 一个类别的杂乱程度越高，根据通用线索定位物体就越困难。如果一个物体无法在前1000个窗口内定位（ILSVRC中平均每类有1%的图像如此，PASCAL中为5%），我们设obj(m)=1001。超过95%的物体可以用这些窗口定位的事实表明objectness线索已经相当强，因此平均需要许多窗口的物体将极难检测：例如，ILSVRC中的乒乓球（杂乱度9.57，平均758个窗口）、篮球（杂乱度9.21）、冰球（杂乱度9.17）。PASCAL中最难的物体是瓶子，杂乱度得分为8.47。平均而言，ILSVRC的杂乱度得分为3.59。ILSVRC中最难的250个对象类别子集，其类别数量高一个数量级，且平均杂乱度（5.90）与PASCAL数据集相同。

full.sec: Appendix D Hierarchy of questions for full image annotation
full.secZh: 附录D 全图标注问题层级结构

items.en: The following is a hierarchy of questions manually constructed for crowdsourcing full annotation of images with the presence or absence of 200 object detection categories in ILSVRC2013 and ILSVRC2014. All questions are of the form “is there a … in the image?” Questions marked with ∙∙\bullet are asked on every image. If the answer to a question is determined to be “no” then the answer to all descendant questions is assumed to be “no”. The 200 numbered leaf nodes correspond to the 200 object detection categories.
items.zh: 以下是为众包完整标注ILSVRC2013和ILSVRC2014中200个目标检测类别图像而手动构建的问题层级。所有问题的形式均为“图像中是否有……？”。标有“∙”的问题在每个图像上都会询问。如果某个问题的答案被确定为“否”，则其所有子问题的答案均假定为“否”。200个编号的叶节点对应200个目标检测类别。

items.en: The goal in the hierarchy construction is to save cost (by asking as few questions as possible on every image) while avoiding any ambiguity in questions which would lead to false negatives during annotation. This hierarchy is not tree-structured; some questions have multiple parents.
items.zh: 层级构建的目标是在避免问题歧义导致标注假阴性的同时，通过尽可能少地询问每个图像来节省成本。该层级并非树状结构；有些问题有多个父节点。

full.sec: Appendix E Modification to bounding box system for object detection
full.secZh: 附录E 物体检测边界框系统修改

items.en: The bounding box annotation system described in Section 3.2.1 is used for annotating images for both the single-object localization dataset and the object detection dataset. However, two additional manual post-processing are needed to ensure accuracy in the object detection scenario:
items.zh: 第3.2.1节描述的边界框标注系统用于标注单目标定位数据集和目标检测数据集的图像。然而，在目标检测场景中，需要额外两个手动后处理步骤以确保准确性：

items.en: The first common source of error was that workers were not able to accurately differentiate some object classes during annotation. Some commonly confused labels were seal and sea otter, backpack and purse, banjo and guitar, violin and cello, brass instruments (trumpet, trombone, french horn and brass), flute and oboe, ladle and spatula. Despite our best efforts (providing positive and negative example images in the annotation task, adding text explanations to alert the user to the distinction between these categories) these errors persisted.
items.zh: 第一个常见错误来源是工人在标注过程中无法准确区分某些目标类别。一些常被混淆的标签包括海豹和海獭、背包和钱包、班卓琴和吉他、小提琴和大提琴、铜管乐器（小号、长号、圆号和铜管）、长笛和双簧管、勺子和小铲。尽管我们尽了最大努力（在标注任务中提供正负示例图像，添加文字说明以提醒用户注意这些类别之间的区别），这些错误仍然存在。

items.en: In the single-object localization setting, this problem was not as prominent for two reasons. First, the way the data was collected imposed a strong prior on the object class which was present. Second, since only one object category needed to be annotated per image, ambiguous images could be discarded: for example, if workers couldn’t agree on whether or not a trumpet was in fact present, this image could simply be removed. In contrast, for the object detection setting consensus had to be reached for all target categories on all images.
items.zh: 在单目标定位设置中，这个问题不太突出，原因有二。首先，数据收集方式对存在的目标类别施加了强先验。其次，由于每张图像只需标注一个目标类别，模糊图像可以被丢弃：例如，如果工人无法就图像中是否确实存在小号达成一致，这张图像可以直接移除。相比之下，在目标检测设置中，必须对所有图像上的所有目标类别达成共识。

items.en: To fix this problem, once bounding box annotations were collected we manually looked through all cases where the bounding boxes for two different object classes had significant overlap with each other (about 3%percent33\% of the collected boxes). About a quarter of these boxes were found to correspond to incorrect objects and were removed. Crowdsourcing this post-processing step (with very stringent accuracy constraints) would be possible but it occurred in few enough cases that it was faster (and more accurate) to do this in-house.
items.zh: 为了解决这个问题，在收集边界框标注后，我们手动检查了所有两个不同目标类别的边界框之间存在显著重叠的情况（约占收集框的3%）。其中约四分之一的框被确定为对应错误目标并被移除。将这一后处理步骤外包给众包（在非常严格的准确性约束下）是可能的，但由于这种情况数量较少，内部处理更快（也更准确）。

items.en: The second common source of error were duplicate bounding boxes drawn on the same object instance. Despite instructions not to draw more than one bounding box around the same object instance and constraints in the annotation UI enforcing at least a 5 pixel difference between different bounding boxes, these errors persisted. One reason was that sometimes the initial bounding box was not perfect and subsequent labelers drew a slightly improved alternative.
items.zh: 第二个常见错误来源是在同一目标实例上绘制了重复的边界框。尽管有指示不要在同一目标实例上绘制多个边界框，并且标注UI中强制要求不同边界框之间至少有5像素的差异，这些错误仍然存在。一个原因是初始边界框有时不完美，后续标注者绘制了略有改进的替代框。

items.en: This type of error was also present in the single-object localization scenario but was not a major cause for concern. A duplicate bounding box is a slightly perturbed but still correct positive example, and single-object localization is only concerned with correctly localizing one object instance. For the detection task algorithms are evaluated on the ability to localize every object instance, and penalized for duplicate detections, so it is imperative that these labeling errors are corrected (even if they only appear in about 0.6%percent0.60.6\% of cases).
items.zh: 这种错误在单目标定位场景中也存在，但并非主要问题。重复边界框是略有扰动但仍正确的正例，而单目标定位只关心正确定位一个目标实例。对于检测任务，算法评估的是定位每个目标实例的能力，并且重复检测会受到惩罚，因此纠正这些标注错误至关重要（即使它们仅出现在约0.6%的情况下）。

items.en: Approximately 1%percent11\% of bounding boxes were found to have significant overlap of more than 50%percent5050\% with another bounding box of the same object class.We again manually verified all of these cases in-house. In approximately 40%percent4040\% of the cases the two bounding boxes correctly corresponded to different people in a crowd, to stacked plates, or to musical instruments nearby in an orchestra. In the other 60%percent6060\% of cases one of the boxes was randomly removed.
items.zh: 大约1%的边界框被发现与同一目标类别的另一个边界框有超过50%的显著重叠。我们再次内部手动验证了所有这些情况。在大约40%的情况下，两个边界框正确对应于人群中的不同人、堆叠的盘子或管弦乐队中相邻的乐器。在其他60%的情况下，随机移除其中一个框。

items.en: These verification steps complete the annotation procedure of bounding boxes around every instance of every object class in validation, test and a subset of training images for the detection task.
items.zh: 这些验证步骤完成了检测任务中验证集、测试集和部分训练集图像上每个目标类别每个实例的边界框标注过程。

items.en: With the optimized algorithm of Section 3.3.3 we fully annotated the validation and test sets. However, annotating all training images with all target object classes was still a budget challenge. Positive training images taken from the single-object localization dataset already had bounding box annotations of all instances of one object class on each image. We extended the existing annotations to the detection dataset by making two modification. First, we corrected any bounding box omissions resulting from merging fine-grained categories: i.e., if an image belonged to the ”dalmatian” category and all instances of ”dalmatian” were annotated with bounding boxes for single-object localization, we ensured that all remaining ”dog” instances are also annotated for the object detection task. Second, we collected significantly more training data for the person class because the existing annotation set was not diverse enough to be representative (the only people categories in the single-object localization task are scuba diver, groom, and ballplayer). To compensate, we additionally annotated people in a large fraction of the existing training set images.
items.zh: 使用第3.3.3节的优化算法，我们完整标注了验证集和测试集。然而，用所有目标类别标注所有训练图像仍然是一个预算挑战。来自单目标定位数据集的正面训练图像已经具有每张图像上一个目标类别所有实例的边界框标注。我们通过两个修改将现有标注扩展到检测数据集。首先，我们纠正了因合并细粒度类别导致的任何边界框遗漏：例如，如果一张图像属于“达尔马提亚犬”类别，并且所有“达尔马提亚犬”实例都已用边界框标注用于单目标定位，我们确保所有剩余的“狗”实例也针对目标检测任务进行标注。其次，我们为人物类收集了显著更多的训练数据，因为现有标注集不够多样化（单目标定位任务中唯一的人物类别是潜水员、新郎和棒球运动员）。为了弥补，我们在现有训练集图像的大部分中额外标注了人物。

items.en: At the beginning of the competition period each year we release the new training/validation/test images, training/validation annotations, and competition specification for the year. We then specify a deadline for submission, usually approximately 4 months after the release of data. Teams are asked to upload a text file of their predicted annotations on test images by this deadline to a provided server. We then evaluate all submissions and release the results.
items.zh: 每年比赛期开始时，我们发布当年的新训练/验证/测试图像、训练/验证标注以及比赛规范。然后我们设定提交截止日期，通常在数据发布后约4个月。要求团队在截止日期前将预测的测试图像标注文本文件上传到指定服务器。然后我们评估所有提交并发布结果。

items.en: For every task we released code that takes a text file of automatically generated image annotations and compares it with the ground truth annotations to return a quantitative measure of algorithm accuracy. Teams can use this code to evaluate their performance on the validation data.
items.zh: 对于每项任务，我们发布了代码，该代码读取自动生成的图像标注文本文件，并将其与真实标注进行比较，以返回算法准确性的定量度量。团队可以使用此代码在验证数据上评估其性能。

items.en: As described in (Everingham et al.,, 2014), there are three options for measuring performance on test data: (i) Release test images and annotations, and allow participants to assess performance themselves; (ii) Release test images but not test annotations – participants submit results and organizers assess performance; (iii) Neither test images nor annotations are released – participants submit software and organizers run it on new data and assess performance. In line with the PASCAL VOC choice, we opted for option (ii). Option (i) allows too much leeway in overfitting to the test data; option (iii) is infeasible, especially given the scale of our test set (40K-100K images).
items.zh: 如(Everingham等人, 2014)所述，测试数据性能评估有三种选择：(i) 发布测试图像和标注，允许参与者自行评估性能；(ii) 发布测试图像但不发布测试标注——参与者提交结果，组织者评估性能；(iii) 既不发布测试图像也不发布标注——参与者提交软件，组织者在新数据上运行并评估性能。与PASCAL VOC的选择一致，我们选择了选项(ii)。选项(i)允许过多地过拟合测试数据；选项(iii)不可行，尤其是考虑到我们测试集的规模（4万到10万张图像）。

items.en: We released ILSVRC2010 test annotations for the image classification task, but all other test annotations have remained hidden to discourage fine-tuning results on the test data.
items.zh: 我们发布了ILSVRC2010图像分类任务的测试标注，但所有其他测试标注一直隐藏，以阻止在测试数据上微调结果。

items.en: After the challenge period we set up an automatic evaluation server that researchers can use throughout the year to continue evaluating their algorithms against the ground truth test annotations. We limit teams to 2 submissions per week to discourage parameter tuning on the test data, and in practice we have never had a problem with researchers abusing the system.
items.zh: 挑战期结束后，我们设置了一个自动评估服务器，研究人员可以在全年使用它继续评估其算法与真实测试标注的对比。我们限制团队每周提交2次，以防止在测试数据上调整参数，实际上我们从未遇到过研究人员滥用系统的问题。
